role.en: Founder of institutionalized Pietism and creator of the Francke Foundations

name.zh: 尼古劳斯·路德维希·冯·亲岑多夫

title.zh: 伯爵 / 摩拉维亚兄弟会领袖
title.en: Count / Leader of the Moravian Brethren

role.zh: 摩拉维亚兄弟会的重建者，推动全球传教运动
role.en: Rebuilder of the Moravian Brethren and promoter of a global missionary movement

rulerTitle.zh: 奧地利女大公兼匈牙利與波希米亞女王
rulerTitle.en: Archduchess of Austria and Queen of Hungary and Bohemia

governmentForm.zh: 由王朝統合的多民族複合君主制，各領地保留不同法權、議會傳統與行政慣例，但在君主與中央機關領導下逐步走向集中化
governmentForm.en: A dynastically unified multiethnic composite monarchy in which the crown ruled diverse lands retaining distinct laws, estates, and administrative traditions, while central authority increasingly pursued consolidation.

socialStructure.zh: 社會由宮廷與高級貴族、教士、地方貴族與官僚、城市市民、行會工匠、農民與部分地區仍受重役束縛的農奴構成；族群與法域差異明顯，德意志、捷克、匈牙利、克羅埃西亞、義大利、佛蘭芒、瓦隆、羅馬尼亞與南斯拉夫諸群體共存
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the court and high nobility, clergy, provincial nobles and officials, urban burghers, guild artisans, peasants, and in some regions still heavily burdened serfs; ethnic and legal diversity was pronounced, with Germans, Czechs, Hungarians, Croats, Italians, Flemings, Walloons, Romanians, and South Slavic peoples under one crown.

rulingClass.zh: 王朝宮廷、高級貴族、主教團、樞密與財政官僚，以及各王國與省份的等級代表構成統治核心
rulingClass.en: The ruling elite was formed by the dynastic court, high aristocracy, senior clergy, central bureaucrats in privy and fiscal institutions, and the estates of the constituent kingdoms and provinces.

succession.zh: 依據《國事詔書》所確立的哈布斯堡世襲繼承原則，允許女性繼承王朝領地，但各地仍需由本地法理與等級承認其統治權
succession.en: Succession followed the hereditary principles established by the Pragmatic Sanction, permitting female inheritance of Habsburg dominions, though recognition still depended on local constitutional traditions and estate acceptance.

structure.zh: 1750年的哈布斯堡統治仍是分層而不完全統一的中央—地方體系。維也納宮廷透過宮廷會議、財政機關、司法機關與戰爭行政機構統籌主要政策；奧地利、波希米亞、匈牙利、奧屬尼德蘭、米蘭、蒂羅爾等地仍保有各自法制與地方機關。瑪麗亞·特蕾西亞在戰後推行改革，強化文官體系、稅收登記、軍役與省級監督
structure.en: In 1750 the Habsburg state remained a layered and not fully unified central-local system. The Vienna court coordinated major policy through court councils, fiscal offices, judicial bodies, and war administration; Austria, Bohemia, Hungary, the Austrian Netherlands, Milan, Tyrol, and other lands still retained distinct legal systems and local institutions. After the War of the Austrian Succession, Maria Theresa pushed reforms to strengthen the civil service, tax registration, military obligation, and provincial supervision.

function.zh: 協調王朝高層決策、外交、戰略與重大內政議題，為君主提供跨部門建議
function.en: Coordinated high policy, diplomacy, strategy, and major domestic questions, advising the monarch across departments.

function.zh: 管理王室與國家財政、稅收徵解、債務、鹽務、礦業與部分商業特權
function.en: Managed crown and state finance, taxation, debt, salt revenues, mining, and selected commercial monopolies.

function.zh: 主管常備軍、邊防要塞、補給、軍官任命與作戰規劃
function.en: Oversaw the standing army, frontier fortresses, logistics, officer appointments, and operational planning.

function.zh: 處理高等司法、上訴與君主領地內不同法域之協調
function.en: Handled high justice, appeals, and coordination among the monarchy's diverse legal jurisdictions.

name.zh: 波希米亞—奧地利宮廷總理府

function.zh: 統管奧地利與波希米亞核心領地的文書、行政監督與政令傳達
function.en: Managed documentation, administrative oversight, and decree transmission for the Austrian and Bohemian core lands.

function.zh: 處理匈牙利王國及其附屬地的政務，維繫其獨特憲制與王室關係
function.en: Handled affairs of the Kingdom of Hungary and its dependencies, preserving its distinct constitutional relationship with the crown.

function.zh: 核查省級帳目、軍費報銷、包稅與借貸契約，提升財政透明度
function.en: Reviewed provincial accounts, military reimbursements, tax farming, and loan contracts, improving fiscal oversight.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依各地傳統而異。奧地利與波希米亞地區由省級機關、郡縣與領主司法單位共同治理；匈牙利以郡和貴族自治傳統為主；軍事邊區由軍政體制直接管理；奧屬尼德蘭與義大利領地則保留相當程度的地方法權與城市特權
localAdmin.en: Local administration varied by province. In Austria and Bohemia, provincial offices, districts, and seigneurial jurisdictions shared governance; Hungary relied heavily on county institutions and noble self-government; the Military Frontier was governed through direct military administration; the Austrian Netherlands and Italian possessions retained substantial local legal and urban privileges.

legalSystem.zh: 法律體系高度多元，結合羅馬法傳統、地方習慣法、王室敕令、封建權利與教會法。不同王國和省份在土地、稅役、繼承與刑事程序上差異顯著，中央改革趨勢是增加成文行政規範與司法上訴秩序
legalSystem.en: The legal system was highly plural, combining Roman-law traditions, customary law, royal ordinances, feudal rights, and canon law. Different kingdoms and provinces diverged sharply in land tenure, taxation, inheritance, and criminal procedure, while central reform aimed at more written administrative regulation and clearer appellate order.

taxationSystem.zh: 稅制以土地稅、領地直接稅、消費稅、鹽稅、關稅、礦山與鑄幣收益為主。不同地區稅基不一，貴族與教士常享有豁免或議價空間。戰後改革致力於擴大對貴族領地與農村人口的登記、提高徵收效率，並以更穩定的財源支持常備軍
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on land taxes, direct provincial contributions, excises, salt duties, customs, and revenues from mining and minting. The tax base differed across regions, and nobles and clergy often enjoyed exemptions or bargaining power. Postwar reforms sought broader registration of noble estates and rural populations, higher collection efficiency, and more stable funding for the standing army.

religion.zh: 以羅馬天主教為官方與宮廷主導宗教，並強力支持巴洛克天主教文化；同時境內存在新教群體、東儀天主教徒、東正教徒與猶太社群，宗教寬容程度因地而異且仍受限制
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the official and court-dominant religion, strongly patronizing Baroque Catholic culture; at the same time the monarchy included Protestant communities, Greek Catholics, Orthodox believers, and Jewish populations, with toleration varying by province and remaining limited.

philosophy.zh: 思想上仍以天主教王權、自然法、官僚理性與早期啟蒙實用主義並存。宮廷改革者重視國家利益、人口、軍事與財政的理性管理，但未完全採納後來更激進的啟蒙自由主張
philosophy.en: Intellectually the monarchy combined Catholic dynastic authority, natural-law thinking, bureaucratic rationality, and early Enlightenment pragmatism. Reformers at court emphasized rational management of state interest, population, military power, and finance, without yet embracing later more radical liberal Enlightenment doctrines.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；拉丁文仍在法律、學術與匈牙利政治生活中地位重要，德語在中央行政中日益增強，另有捷克語、匈牙利語、義大利語、克羅埃西亞語、荷蘭語與法語等區域書寫傳統
writingSystem.en: The monarchy primarily used the Latin alphabet; Latin remained important in law, scholarship, and Hungarian political life, while German gained steadily in central administration, alongside regional written traditions in Czech, Hungarian, Italian, Croatian, Dutch, and French.

culturalAchievements.zh: 維也納與布拉格等地延續巴洛克與洛可可藝術傳統，在宮廷建築、教堂藝術、音樂、歌劇與禮儀文化方面成就突出。哈布斯堡宮廷贊助學術與醫學教育，並逐步以國家需要推動統計、測繪與行政知識積累
culturalAchievements.en: Vienna, Prague, and other centers sustained major Baroque and Rococo achievements in court architecture, church art, music, opera, and ceremonial culture. The Habsburg court patronized scholarship and medical education, while increasingly promoting statistics, mapping, and administrative knowledge for reasons of state.

languageFamily.zh: 官方與常用語言橫跨印歐語系中的日耳曼、斯拉夫、羅曼與烏拉爾語族影響範圍，形成典型多語帝國文化
languageFamily.en: Its official and commonly used languages spanned Germanic, Slavic, Romance, and Uralic spheres within the broader Indo-European world, producing a characteristically multilingual imperial culture.

gdpDescription.zh: 哈布斯堡君主國在1750年屬歐洲大型農業—財政—軍事經濟體，總量可觀，但人均產出中等。核心財富來自多瑙河流域農業、波希米亞與內奧地利手工業、匈牙利畜牧與穀物、尼德蘭商業以及阿爾卑斯礦業。戰後重建與改革增強了財政汲取能力，但地區分化仍很大
gdpDescription.en: In 1750 the Habsburg Monarchy was a major European agrarian-fiscal-military economy with substantial aggregate output but middling per capita productivity. Its wealth came from Danubian agriculture, Bohemian and Inner Austrian manufactures, Hungarian livestock and grain, Netherlandish commerce, and Alpine mining. Postwar recovery and reform increased fiscal extraction, though regional disparities remained large.

mainIndustries.zh: 農業、葡萄酒生產、畜牧、礦業、冶金、紡織、玻璃、軍需製造、鹽業、林業與河運貿易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, wine production, livestock raising, mining, metallurgy, textiles, glassmaking, armaments manufacture, salt production, forestry, and riverine trade.

tradeGoods.zh: 穀物、牛隻、羊毛、葡萄酒、木材、鐵、銅、鉛、汞、玻璃、亞麻布、毛織品、鹽與軍需品
tradeGoods.en: Grain, cattle, wool, wine, timber, iron, copper, lead, mercury, glass, linen, woolens, salt, and military supplies.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭財富差異極大。城市商人、金融家、礦業經營者與大地主積累顯著資本；多數農戶擁有有限牲畜、工具與土地使用權，邊區與封建負擔較重地區的家庭資產尤為脆弱
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Urban merchants, financiers, mining operators, and major landlords accumulated significant capital, while most peasant households possessed only limited livestock, tools, and land-use rights; family assets were especially fragile in frontier and heavily burdened seigneurial regions.

economicSystem.zh: 以農業與領主制為基礎，結合王室重商主義、行會監管、特許壟斷與國家導向製造業扶植的混合經濟。政府愈發把財政、人口與生產視為可計算與可管理的國力資源
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on agrarian lordship, combined with crown mercantilism, guild regulation, privileged monopolies, and state encouragement of strategic manufactures. Government increasingly treated finance, population, and production as measurable and governable resources of power.

source.zh: 消費稅、鹽稅與專賣收益
source.en: Excises, salt duties, and monopoly revenues

source.zh: 王室領地、礦業與鑄幣收益
source.en: Crown domains, mining, and mint revenues

treasuryDescription.zh: 國庫在戰後已由危機狀態轉向審慎穩定，但仍承受常備軍、要塞與舊債壓力。財政改善更多來自徵收效率提升與常規化管理，而非真正寬裕的盈餘
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury had moved from wartime crisis toward cautious stability after the war, but remained burdened by the standing army, fortress maintenance, and accumulated debt. Fiscal improvement rested more on better collection and routine management than on genuinely ample surplus.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 財政策略以戰後整頓、擴大稅基、減少地方逃漏、強化軍事供款與提高信用能力為核心；在不完全觸動各地特權的前提下，逐步推進更可持續的中央汲取體系
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on postwar reconstruction, widening the tax base, reducing local evasion, strengthening military contributions, and improving creditworthiness; without fully overturning provincial privileges, the regime gradually built a more sustainable central extraction system.

description.zh: 為軍隊主體，由德意志、波希米亞、匈牙利、尼德蘭與義大利諸地徵募組成，採線列戰術，以燧發槍、刺刀與團級炮兵支援作戰
description.en: The core of the army, recruited from German, Bohemian, Hungarian, Netherlandish, and Italian lands, fighting in linear formations with flintlock muskets, bayonets, and regimental artillery support.

description.zh: 包括胸甲騎兵、龍騎兵與著名的匈牙利輕騎兵，兼具偵察、追擊、掩護與衝擊任務，在對抗普魯士與奧斯曼邊境戰爭中極具價值
description.en: Included cuirassiers, dragoons, and the renowned Hungarian hussars, performing reconnaissance, pursuit, screening, and shock duties, especially valuable against Prussia and along the Ottoman frontier.

description.zh: 負責野戰炮、攻城戰、築城與橋樑工程；改革後在訓練、口徑標準化與要塞技術方面逐步提升
description.en: Responsible for field guns, siege warfare, fortification, and bridging; reform efforts gradually improved training, standardization of calibers, and fortress engineering.

description.zh: 部署於對奧斯曼邊境的半常備部隊，兼具屯墾、警戒與地方防衛功能，由邊民軍戶承擔軍役
description.en: Semi-standing forces stationed on the Ottoman border, combining settlement, surveillance, and local defense duties through soldier-peasant communities.

commanderInChief.zh: 瑪麗亞·特蕾西亞女王名義統帥，實務由宮廷戰爭會議與高級元帥、將軍團執行
commanderInChief.en: Queen Maria Theresa served as formal commander-in-chief, while practical control rested with the Aulic War Council and the senior marshals and generals.

technology.zh: 軍事技術屬18世紀中葉歐洲一流水準，使用燧發槍、刺刀、標準化野戰炮、攻城工兵與規訓化線列步兵。雖在戰術靈活性與指揮效率上曾受普魯士挑戰，但改革後訓練、參謀化與補給能力持續改善
technology.en: Military technology stood at a first-rank mid-18th-century European level, employing flintlock muskets, bayonets, standardized field artillery, siege engineers, and disciplined linear infantry. Though challenged by Prussian tactical flexibility and command efficiency, reforms steadily improved training, proto-staff procedures, and logistics.

threats.zh: 主要威脅來自普魯士在德意志地區的擴張與西里西亞問題、奧斯曼帝國邊境壓力、與法國和巴伐利亞等德意志政治變局相關的外交風險，以及俄羅斯與波蘭局勢變動對中東歐權力平衡的影響
threats.en: Principal threats came from Prussian expansion in Germany and the unresolved Silesian question, pressure along the Ottoman frontier, diplomatic risks tied to France, Bavaria, and wider German politics, and the impact of Russian and Polish developments on the balance of power in east-central Europe.

populationDescription.zh: 1750年人口約一千八百萬，為歐洲人口大國之一。人口分布於下奧地利、波希米亞、摩拉維亞、內奧地利、匈牙利平原、克羅埃西亞、蒂羅爾、倫巴底、奧屬尼德蘭與軍事邊區。戰後恢復、農業擴張與較長期的人口增長趨勢使總人口保持上升
populationDescription.en: With roughly 18 million inhabitants in 1750, the monarchy was one of Europe's major demographic powers. Population was spread across Lower Austria, Bohemia, Moravia, Inner Austria, the Hungarian plain, Croatia, Tyrol, Lombardy, the Austrian Netherlands, and the Military Frontier. Postwar recovery, agrarian expansion, and longer-term population growth sustained overall increase.

socialClasses.zh: 上層為王室、宮廷貴族與大地主；其下為高級教士、地方貴族、軍官與文官；城市中有富商、金融家、行會師傅、小商販與工匠；人口多數為農民、佃農、農奴與邊民軍戶。不同地區的封建負擔、城市自治與族群身份造成明顯社會分層差異
socialClasses.en: At the top stood the dynasty, court nobility, and great landowners; below them were senior clergy, provincial nobles, officers, and civil officials; towns contained wealthy merchants, financiers, guild masters, petty traders, and artisans; the majority of the population consisted of peasants, tenants, serfs, and frontier soldier-settlers. Feudal burdens, urban autonomy, and ethnic identity created strong regional variation in social hierarchy.

allies.zh: 1750年最重要的實際合作夥伴傾向包括大不列顛王國、荷蘭共和國與薩伏依-撒丁王國；與俄羅斯帝國在制衡普魯士與奧斯曼問題上亦存在戰略互動，但聯盟結構仍處於七年戰爭前的過渡階段
allies.en: In 1750 its most important practical partners tended to include Great Britain, the Dutch Republic, and Savoy-Sardinia; there was also strategic interaction with the Russian Empire over balancing Prussia and the Ottoman Empire, though alliance structures were still in transition before the Seven Years' War.

enemies.zh: 主要對手為普魯士王國；傳統競爭與邊境安全考量亦使奧斯曼帝國構成長期威脅。法國雖在奧地利王位繼承戰爭中為敵，但到1750年雙邊關係已開始進入重新評估期
enemies.en: The principal rival was the Kingdom of Prussia; the Ottoman Empire also remained a long-term threat for reasons of frontier security and traditional rivalry. France had been an enemy in the War of the Austrian Succession, but by 1750 relations were already entering a phase of reassessment.

foreignPolicy.zh: 對外政策核心是保全王朝領地、恢復大國地位、尋求收復西里西亞、維持德意志與義大利影響力、守住對奧斯曼邊境，並以聯姻、條約、補貼與宮廷外交維繫歐洲均勢
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving the dynastic lands, restoring great-power standing, seeking eventual recovery of Silesia, maintaining influence in Germany and Italy, securing the Ottoman frontier, and using marriage, treaties, subsidies, and court diplomacy to sustain the European balance of power.

era.zh: 啟蒙時代

keyInnovations.zh: 關鍵能力不在單一發明，而在國家化管理技術：常備軍制度、燧發槍線列戰術、築城工程、地籍與稅籍調查、統計行政、道路與郵政網絡改進、採礦與冶金技術，以及醫學與軍需供應中的制度化專業化
keyInnovations.en: Its key advances lay less in a single invention than in techniques of state management: the standing-army system, flintlock linear warfare, fortification engineering, cadastral and tax surveys, statistical administration, improved roads and postal networks, mining and metallurgical expertise, and increasing professionalization in medicine and military supply.

strengths.zh: 疆域廣大、人口眾多、資源基礎多樣，具備歐洲一流常備軍與深厚王朝合法性；維也納能動員多地稅源、兵源與行政人才，並在戰敗後迅速展開制度改革，顯示出顯著的韌性
strengths.en: Its strengths were vast territory, large population, diverse resources, a first-rank European standing army, and deep dynastic legitimacy; Vienna could mobilize revenue, manpower, and administrative talent from many lands, and its rapid institutional reform after defeat demonstrated notable resilience.

weaknesses.zh: 內部最大弱點是複合君主制的碎片化：各地法權、稅制、語言與特權不一，限制中央效率；財政仍受債務與軍費重壓，農村生產率偏低，對普魯士式高效率軍政體系的回應尚未完全成熟
weaknesses.en: The chief weakness was the fragmentation of the composite monarchy: differing laws, taxes, languages, and privileges constrained central efficiency; finance remained burdened by debt and military costs, rural productivity was modest, and adaptation to the highly efficient Prussian military-fiscal model was still incomplete.

outlook.zh: 1750年的前景總體穩定而審慎樂觀。若改革能持續推進並重組外交聯盟，哈布斯堡君主國仍可能維持歐洲大國地位並逐步恢復戰略主動；但若無法解決西里西亞問題、財政壓力與地方特權阻力，其競爭力將繼續受限
outlook.en: The outlook in 1750 was stable and cautiously optimistic. If reforms continued and diplomacy was successfully realigned, the Habsburg Monarchy could retain its place as a major European power and gradually recover strategic initiative; if not, unresolved issues over Silesia, fiscal strain, and provincial privilege would continue to limit its competitiveness.

description.zh: 中欧多民族君主复合体，在奥地利王位继承战争后继续整顿改革。
description.en: A multiethnic Central European composite monarchy continuing reform and consolidation after the War of the Austrian Succession.

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制下的议会王国，由王权、内阁与两院议会共同运作
governmentForm.en: A parliamentary kingdom under constitutional monarchy, governed through the interaction of crown, cabinet, and bicameral Parliament

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈等级化但流动性较高，上层由贵族、地主绅士、高级教士与富商组成，中层包括专业人士、商人、工匠与租佃农，下层为农业雇工、城市贫民、水手与产业工人；苏格兰高地、英格兰乡村与大城市之间差异显著
socialStructure.en: Society was hierarchical but comparatively mobile, with an upper layer of aristocrats, landed gentry, senior clergy, and wealthy merchants; a middling stratum of professionals, traders, artisans, and tenant farmers; and lower orders of laborers, urban poor, sailors, and industrial workers. Marked regional differences existed between the Scottish Highlands, the English countryside, and major cities

rulingClass.zh: 世袭贵族、地主绅士、宫廷显贵、议会议员、金融寡头与海军行政精英
rulingClass.en: Hereditary aristocracy, landed gentry, court elites, members of Parliament, financial oligarchs, and naval-administrative elites

succession.zh: 依照王位继承法实行汉诺威家族的新教世袭继承，排除天主教继承人
succession.en: Protestant hereditary succession in the Hanoverian line under the Acts of Settlement, excluding Catholic claimants

structure.zh: 中央政体由国王、枢密院、内阁、上议院与下议院构成。实际行政日益集中于以内阁首脑与财政、海军、陆军等大臣为核心的责任政府雏形。全国并非完全统一行政国家，英格兰与苏格兰在1707年联合法案后共享议会，但法律与教会体系仍部分分立
structure.en: The central polity consisted of the king, Privy Council, cabinet, House of Lords, and House of Commons. Effective administration increasingly centered on an emerging cabinet system led by chief ministers and departmental heads in finance, navy, and army. The kingdom was not a fully uniform administrative state: after the 1707 Union, England and Scotland shared a Parliament, while retaining partially distinct legal and ecclesiastical systems

function.zh: 管理国家收入、国债、预算拨款、税务协调与公共信用
function.en: Managed state revenue, public debt, budgetary allocation, tax coordination, and public credit

function.zh: 统筹皇家海军战略、舰队部署、军官任命与海上作战计划
function.en: Directed Royal Navy strategy, fleet deployment, officer appointments, and maritime war planning

function.zh: 负责造船、补给、船厂、薪饷、仓储与舰队后勤
function.en: Handled shipbuilding, supplies, dockyards, wages, stores, and naval logistics

name.zh: 南方部与北方部国务办公室

function.zh: 处理对外外交、王室通信、部分内政与情报事务，是后世外交部与内政部的前身
function.en: Managed foreign diplomacy, royal correspondence, parts of domestic administration, and intelligence, serving as precursors to later foreign and home offices

function.zh: 负责陆军编制、驻军、军需、军官事务与本土防务协调
function.en: Administered army establishment, garrisons, supply, officer affairs, and homeland defense coordination

function.zh: 征收关税、消费税，打击走私，监管港口贸易与国内间接税
function.en: Collected customs and excise, suppressed smuggling, and supervised port trade and domestic indirect taxation

name.zh: 铸币局与财政附属机构

function.zh: 管理铸币、金银标准、政府支付与财政文书
function.en: Managed coinage, bullion standards, government payments, and fiscal paperwork

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依托郡、教区、自治市与治安法官体系。郡由地主绅士出任治安法官，负责治安、道路、贫民法与地方司法；城市中由市政 corporation 与行会传统机构管理。苏格兰保留独特法律与地方制度，殖民地则由皇家总督、特许公司或地方议会管理
localAdmin.en: Local administration rested on counties, parishes, boroughs, and the magistracy. Counties were governed largely through justices of the peace drawn from the gentry, overseeing order, roads, poor relief, and local justice; towns relied on municipal corporations and older guild-based institutions. Scotland retained distinct legal and local institutions, while colonies were governed by royal governors, chartered companies, or colonial assemblies

legalSystem.zh: 英格兰以普通法、成文法与判例法为基础，强调陪审审判与财产权保护；苏格兰则维持独立的混合法传统。议会主权与法治观念不断加强，但选举腐败、宗教限制与阶级差异仍深刻影响司法实践
legalSystem.en: England operated under common law, statute law, and precedent, emphasizing jury trial and property rights; Scotland preserved its own mixed legal tradition. Parliamentary sovereignty and the rule of law were strengthening, though electoral corruption, religious restrictions, and class distinctions still deeply shaped legal practice

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以消费税、关税、土地税、印花税及各类间接税为核心，并依赖高度发达的国债制度融资。税收征管能力在欧洲名列前茅，尤其适合支撑长期海军战争与全球商业保护
taxationSystem.en: The tax system centered on excises, customs duties, the land tax, stamp duties, and other indirect levies, supplemented by a highly developed funded national debt. Revenue collection was among the most effective in Europe, especially suited to sustaining long naval wars and protecting global commerce

religion.zh: 国教为英格兰教会的新教传统，苏格兰以长老会为主；同时存在不从国教的新教徒、天主教少数群体与犹太社群。宗教宽容较前扩大，但政治与公职仍偏向新教徒
religion.en: The established religion was the Protestant Church of England, while Scotland was predominantly Presbyterian; there were also Protestant Dissenters, Catholic minorities, and Jewish communities. Toleration had expanded compared with earlier periods, but politics and public office still favored Protestants

philosophy.zh: 启蒙思想、经验主义、自然法、商业社会理论与新教道德并行发展，洛克、牛顿传统及苏格兰启蒙对政治经济、科学与道德哲学影响深远
philosophy.en: Enlightenment thought, empiricism, natural law, commercial society theory, and Protestant moral culture developed side by side, with the legacies of Locke and Newton and the emerging Scottish Enlightenment exerting deep influence on political economy, science, and moral philosophy

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；行政、出版、商业和科学交流高度依赖印刷英语，拉丁文在学术与法律余波中仍有残存，盖尔语与威尔士语在地方继续使用
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used throughout; administration, print culture, commerce, and science relied heavily on written English, while Latin still lingered in some scholarly and legal contexts, and Gaelic and Welsh remained in regional use

culturalAchievements.zh: 1750年前后的英国在科学、金融、出版、文学与音乐方面极具活力。牛顿科学革命的威望仍在，皇家学会活跃；伦敦成为欧洲最重要的印刷与报刊中心之一；小说、讽刺文学、政治小册子、园林美学与公共咖啡馆文化繁荣，同时出现更成熟的消费文化与大众读写能力提升
culturalAchievements.en: Britain around 1750 was highly dynamic in science, finance, publishing, literature, and music. The prestige of the Newtonian scientific revolution remained powerful, the Royal Society was active, and London was one of Europe's leading centers of print and newspapers. The novel, satire, political pamphleteering, landscape aesthetics, and coffeehouse culture flourished, alongside a more mature consumer culture and rising literacy

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系日耳曼语族，以英语为主；另有凯尔特语支的苏格兰盖尔语、威尔士语与爱尔兰语，以及低地苏格兰语
languageFamily.en: The main language belonged to the Indo-European Germanic family, with English dominant; also present were Celtic languages such as Scottish Gaelic, Welsh, and Irish, as well as Lowland Scots

gdpDescription.zh: 1750年的大不列颠拥有欧洲最具活力的商业化经济之一。农业改良、海外贸易、金融革命、殖民市场与早期工业化共同推动增长。人均产出在欧洲主要大国中处于前列，尤其在港口、纺织、煤炭、航运与金融服务方面表现突出
gdpDescription.en: In 1750 Great Britain possessed one of the most dynamic commercialized economies in Europe. Agricultural improvement, overseas trade, the financial revolution, colonial markets, and early industrialization all supported growth. Output per head stood among the leading major European states, especially in ports, textiles, coal, shipping, and financial services

mainIndustries.zh: 羊毛纺织、棉纺前工业、煤炭开采、铁冶炼、造船、航运、金融保险、糖与烟草再出口、陶器、酿造、渔业与殖民贸易
mainIndustries.en: Wool textiles, proto-industrial cotton manufacture, coal mining, iron smelting, shipbuilding, shipping, finance and insurance, sugar and tobacco re-export, pottery, brewing, fisheries, and colonial trade

tradeGoods.zh: 毛呢、金属制品、煤、陶器、工具、武器、盐鱼、再出口的糖、烟草、茶、咖啡、靛蓝、奴隶贸易关联商品、东印度棉布与香料
tradeGoods.en: Woolens, metal goods, coal, pottery, tools, arms, salted fish, re-exported sugar, tobacco, tea, coffee, indigo, goods tied to the slave trade, and East Indian cottons and spices

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距极大。地主、商人、金融家与殖民投资者积累大量地产、债券和流动资本；中等家庭可能拥有作坊、店铺或租赁农场；多数劳动者仅具有限动产，易受粮价与就业波动冲击
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was extremely unequal. Landlords, merchants, financiers, and colonial investors held substantial estates, securities, and liquid capital; middling households might own workshops, shops, or leasehold farms; most laboring people possessed only modest movable goods and were vulnerable to swings in grain prices and employment

economicSystem.zh: 以私有财产、市场交换、重商主义政策与国家金融能力相结合的商业资本主义体系。政府通过关税、海军保护、特许公司、国债与银行体系扶持贸易扩张，同时国内市场整合程度日益提高
economicSystem.en: A commercial-capitalist system combining private property, market exchange, mercantilist policy, and strong state finance. Government supported expansion through tariffs, naval protection, chartered companies, public debt, and banking institutions, while domestic market integration steadily increased

treasuryDescription.zh: 英国财政实力不在于单纯储银储金，而在于可信的国家信用、英格兰银行、长期公债市场与高效税收。国库存额有限，但可迅速通过借贷动员巨额资源
treasuryDescription.en: British fiscal strength lay not simply in bullion reserves but in credible public credit, the Bank of England, the long-term funded debt market, and efficient taxation. The treasury's cash holdings were limited, but the state could rapidly mobilize vast resources through borrowing

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调维持信用、按期支付国债利息、扩大间接税税基并优先保障海军与战争能力。平时尽量维持可管理赤字或小幅结余，以便在大战时迅速扩张借款
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized preserving credit, servicing public debt punctually, broadening indirect taxation, and prioritizing naval and wartime capacity. In peacetime the government sought manageable deficits or small surpluses so that borrowing could be expanded quickly during major wars

description.zh: 英国最关键的武装力量，拥有全球部署能力，负责护航、封锁、护商、远征与殖民防务。战时可迅速扩充，依托本土船厂与商船体系动员
description.en: Britain's most critical armed force, with global deployment capability for convoy duty, blockade, trade protection, expeditionary warfare, and colonial defense. It could expand rapidly in wartime through domestic dockyards and the merchant marine

description.zh: 由步兵、骑兵、炮兵与驻防部队组成，主要用于本土驻军、爱尔兰控制、欧洲大陆作战与殖民地行动。规模较法奥俄等陆权国家为小，但训练与军官团较稳定
description.en: Composed of infantry, cavalry, artillery, and garrison troops, used for home defense, control of Ireland, campaigning in Europe, and colonial operations. It was smaller than the armies of major continental land powers but relatively stable in training and officer corps

description.zh: 包括郡民兵、地方守备和临时防御力量，战斗力参差不齐，但在本土警备、海岸防御和危机动员中具有重要作用
description.en: Included county militias, local guards, and temporary defense forces; uneven in quality, but important for domestic security, coastal defense, and emergency mobilization

commanderInChief.zh: 乔治二世国王（名义统帅）；实际海军由海军部和舰队将领指挥，陆军由战时总司令与陆军部协调
commanderInChief.en: King George II (nominal commander-in-chief); in practice the navy was directed by the Admiralty and fleet commanders, while the army was coordinated by senior field commanders and the War Office

technology.zh: 军事技术处于火药时代成熟阶段，海军拥有大型风帆战列舰、标准化舰炮、改良航海技术与全球补给网络；陆军装备燧发枪、刺刀、野战炮与线列战术。英国在舰船维护、航海测量、海军后勤与海军火炮训练方面尤为先进
technology.en: Military technology stood at a mature gunpowder-age level, with the navy fielding large sailing ships of the line, standardized naval artillery, improved navigation, and global logistics; the army used flintlock muskets, bayonets, field artillery, and linear tactics. Britain was especially advanced in ship maintenance, hydrography, naval logistics, and gunnery at sea

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自法国海军与殖民竞争、欧洲大陆战争牵连、詹姆斯党残余、本土海岸安全、爱尔兰不稳，以及在印度和北美与法、西及本地势力的冲突
threats.en: Major threats came from French naval and colonial rivalry, entanglement in continental wars, lingering Jacobite sentiment, coastal security concerns, instability in Ireland, and conflicts in India and North America involving French, Spanish, and local powers

populationDescription.zh: 1750年总人口约九百万，其中英格兰人口占绝大多数，苏格兰人口较少但增长明显，威尔士规模较小。人口上升推动城市化、商业化农业与劳动力供给，也加剧了贫困、住房拥挤与粮价敏感性
populationDescription.en: The total population was about nine million in 1750, with England forming the overwhelming majority, Scotland smaller but growing, and Wales comparatively modest in size. Population growth promoted urbanization, commercial agriculture, and labor supply, while also intensifying poverty, overcrowding, and sensitivity to food prices

socialClasses.zh: 主要阶层包括王室与贵族、地主绅士、教士、商人与金融家、专业人士、工匠、租佃农、小农、海员、农业雇工、矿工、制造业工人和城市贫民。'中等阶层'正在壮大，并在消费、政治舆论和地方治理中日益重要
socialClasses.en: Major classes included the royal and aristocratic elite, landed gentry, clergy, merchants and financiers, professionals, artisans, tenant farmers, smallholders, sailors, agricultural laborers, miners, manufacturing workers, and the urban poor. A growing 'middling sort' was becoming increasingly important in consumption, political opinion, and local governance

allies.zh: 主要盟友和合作对象包括奥地利哈布斯堡君主国、荷兰共和国，以及在德意志事务上时常协调的汉诺威与部分新教邦国；在若干时期也与俄罗斯或撒丁王国合作以牵制法国与普鲁士变化局势
allies.en: Principal allies and partners included the Habsburg Monarchy, the Dutch Republic, and, in German affairs, Hanover and certain Protestant states; at times Britain also cooperated with Russia or the Kingdom of Sardinia to contain France and manage shifting Prussian dynamics

enemies.zh: 最主要的长期竞争对手是法兰西王国；在殖民与海上领域也与波旁西班牙存在紧张对抗，并在印度、北美、加勒比与大西洋世界与多方势力发生冲突
enemies.en: The main long-term rival was the Kingdom of France; in colonial and maritime spheres Britain also faced tension with Bourbon Spain, and clashed with various powers in India, North America, the Caribbean, and the Atlantic world

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以海上霸权、贸易保护、殖民扩张和防止欧洲大陆出现单一霸权为核心。英国偏好以海军、补贴盟国和有限大陆干预来维护均势，同时通过东印度公司和殖民行政扩大海外影响
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on maritime supremacy, trade protection, colonial expansion, and preventing any single hegemon from dominating the European continent. Britain preferred to maintain the balance through naval power, subsidies to allies, and limited continental intervention, while extending overseas influence through the East India Company and colonial administration

era.zh: 启蒙时代与早期工业化前夜
era.en: Age of Enlightenment and eve of early industrialization

keyInnovations.zh: 关键创新包括纽科门蒸汽机在矿业中的应用、改良农业轮作与育种、焦炭冶铁的扩展、精密钟表与航海测量、保险与金融票据制度、报刊传播网络，以及不断改良的纺织机械与工场组织形式
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations included the use of the Newcomen steam engine in mining, improved agricultural rotation and selective breeding, expanding coke-smelted iron, precision clockmaking and navigational surveying, insurance and financial paper instruments, newspaper communication networks, and steadily improving textile machinery and workshop organization

protoIndustrialization.zh: 工业革命前夜：纽科门蒸汽机已用于矿井排水，瓦特即将改良蒸汽机（1769年）。亚伯拉罕·达比在铁桥峡谷开创焦炭炼铁。约翰·凯飞梭和哈格里夫斯珍妮纺纱机预示纺织工业革命即将到来。
protoIndustrialization.en: Eve of the Industrial Revolution: Newcomen steam engines pump mines; Watt is about to improve the steam engine (1769). Abraham Darby pioneers coke-smelted iron at Ironbridge Gorge. Kay's flying shuttle and Hargreaves' spinning jenny herald the coming textile revolution.

navalTechnology.zh: 海军技术全球领先：皇家海军控制全球海洋，风帆战列舰（一级战舰100门以上火炮）技术成熟。航海仪器（哈里森航海钟H4解决经度问题）和海图测绘领先世界。
navalTechnology.en: Global naval leadership: Royal Navy controls the oceans; ship-of-the-line technology (100+ gun first-rates) is mature. Navigation instruments (Harrison's H4 chronometer solves the longitude problem) and charting lead the world.

scientificRevolution.zh: 科学革命的延续：牛顿力学和光学理论（1687年《原理》）奠定了现代物理学基础。皇家学会是全球最重要的科学机构。本杰明·富兰克林的电学实验和卡文迪什的化学研究推动自然科学进步。
scientificRevolution.en: Continuation of the Scientific Revolution: Newton's mechanics and optics (1687 Principia) laid modern physics foundations. The Royal Society is the world's most important scientific institution. Franklin's electrical experiments and Cavendish's chemistry advance natural science.

overallAssessment.zh: 1750年的英国正处于人类历史最重大变革的前夜——工业革命即将开始。蒸汽机、焦炭炼铁和纺织机械的萌芽已经出现。海军技术和科学研究继续领先。牛顿科学革命的遗产为技术创新提供了理论基础。英国将在未来50年内从农业社会转变为世界第一个工业化国家。
overallAssessment.en: Britain in 1750 stands on the eve of humanity's most momentous transformation — the Industrial Revolution is about to begin. Seeds of steam engines, coke-smelted iron, and textile machinery are already visible. Naval technology and scientific research continue to lead. Newton's Scientific Revolution legacy provides the theoretical foundation for technological innovation. Britain will transform from an agricultural society to the world's first industrialized nation within 50 years.

strengths.zh: 英国的核心优势在于议会财政能力、稳定的国家信用、强大海军、广泛商船队、全球殖民与贸易网络，以及较高的识字率和技术吸收能力。其政治制度虽然并不民主，却能有效整合地主、商人和金融界利益，为战争与商业扩张提供持续资源
strengths.en: Britain's core strengths lay in parliamentary fiscal capacity, stable public credit, a powerful navy, a broad merchant marine, global colonial and trading networks, and relatively strong literacy and technological adaptability. Its political system, though far from democratic, effectively integrated the interests of landlords, merchants, and financiers, supplying sustained resources for war and commerce

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括严重的社会不平等、选举制度腐败、对间接税和国债的高度依赖、爱尔兰与苏格兰部分地区整合不足，以及陆军规模相对有限。其商业繁荣也深受海运安全、殖民稳定和国际信用波动影响
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included severe social inequality, corruption in the electoral system, heavy dependence on indirect taxation and public debt, incomplete integration of Ireland and parts of Scotland, and a relatively limited army. Its commercial prosperity also depended heavily on secure sea lanes, colonial stability, and fluctuations in international credit

outlook.zh: 1750年的大不列颠前景极为强劲。若能继续压制法国、保障海上通道并深化工业与金融优势，未来数十年很可能成长为世界首屈一指的海洋帝国与工业强国；但其扩张也将带来更沉重的财政、殖民治理与社会矛盾
outlook.en: Great Britain's outlook in 1750 was exceptionally strong. If it could continue to check France, secure maritime routes, and deepen its industrial and financial advantages, it was likely to emerge over the coming decades as the world's foremost maritime empire and industrial power; yet such expansion would also bring heavier fiscal burdens, colonial governance challenges, and social tensions

description.zh: 依托议会、海军与商业扩张的全球性海洋强国。
description.en: A global maritime power built on parliament, naval strength, and commercial expansion.

leader.zh: 纽卡斯尔公爵 / 威廉·皮特（老皮特）
leader.en: Duke of Newcastle / William Pitt the Elder

leaderTitle.zh: 首席财政大臣 / 国务大臣
leaderTitle.en: First Lord of the Treasury / Secretary of State

ideology.zh: 议会主权与光荣革命宪政体制，辉格寡头统治，商业利益与殖民扩张，宗教宽容（新教范畴内）
ideology.en: Parliamentary sovereignty and Glorious Revolution constitutional settlement, Whig oligarchic rule, commercial interests and colonial expansion, religious toleration (within Protestantism)

relationship.zh: 辉格党自1714年汉诺威王朝继承以来持续主导英国政治。纽卡斯尔公爵通过大规模的政治庇护网络控制下院席位，威廉·皮特（老皮特）则以雄辩的口才和帝国扩张愿景赢得公众支持。辉格党代表土地贵族、城市商人和新教非国教派的联合利益，维护汉诺威王朝的统治正统性。
relationship.en: The Whigs had dominated British politics since the Hanoverian succession of 1714. The Duke of Newcastle controlled House of Commons seats through an extensive patronage network, while William Pitt the Elder won public support with his eloquent oratory and vision of imperial expansion. The Whig party represented the combined interests of landed aristocrats, urban merchants, and Protestant Dissenters, upholding the legitimacy of the Hanoverian dynasty.

description.zh: 辉格党在1714年至1760年代间几乎不间断地控制了英国政府，形成了所谓的「辉格寡头统治」时代。这一时期英国的政治体制以议会主权为基础：国王虽保留部分行政权力，但政策制定与财政控制实际上由内阁和下院主导。纽卡斯尔公爵托马斯·佩勒姆-霍利斯是18世纪中叶辉格政治机器的核心操纵者，他通过控制「腐败选区」、分配政府职位和养老金来维系庞大的议会多数。威廉·皮特（1708—1778）则代表辉格党中更具理想主义色彩的帝国主义翼，他在七年战争中主导了英国的全球战略，以「帝国就是商业」为信条推动殖民征服。在辉格统治下，英国完成了从欧洲岛国到全球帝国的关键转型——北美殖民地扩大、东印度公司在印度站稳脚跟、皇家海军确立了海上霸权。辉格寡头政治虽然腐败且排斥大多数人参政，但它提供了稳定的政治框架，使英国得以在工业革命前夕积累关键的商业和制度优势。
description.en: The Whigs controlled the British government almost without interruption from 1714 to the 1760s, creating the so-called age of 'Whig oligarchy.' Britain's political system in this period rested on parliamentary sovereignty: while the king retained certain executive powers, policy-making and fiscal control were effectively dominated by the cabinet and House of Commons. Thomas Pelham-Holles, Duke of Newcastle, was the master manipulator of the mid-18th-century Whig political machine, maintaining a vast parliamentary majority through control of 'rotten boroughs,' distribution of government posts, and pensions. William Pitt (1708–1778) represented the more idealistic imperialist wing of the Whig party; during the Seven Years' War he directed Britain's global strategy under the creed 'empire is commerce,' driving colonial conquest. Under Whig rule Britain completed its critical transformation from European island nation to global empire—North American colonies expanded, the East India Company established a firm foothold in India, and the Royal Navy secured maritime supremacy. Though corrupt and exclusionary of most people from political participation, the Whig oligarchy provided a stable political framework that allowed Britain to accumulate crucial commercial and institutional advantages on the eve of the Industrial Revolution.

role.zh: 辉格党政治机器的核心操纵者，议会庇护网络大师
role.en: Master manipulator of the Whig political machine and parliamentary patronage network

title.en: Secretary of State for the Southern Department

role.zh: 七年战争英国战略的主要制定者，帝国扩张的倡导者
role.en: Chief architect of British strategy in the Seven Years' War and advocate of imperial expansion

leader.zh: 各地乡绅领袖（无统一领袖）

ideology.zh: 英国国教利益维护，乡村地产主的传统权利，反对辉格腐败与过度征税，疑虑大陆战争与殖民冒险
ideology.en: Defense of Church of England interests, traditional rights of country landowners, opposition to Whig corruption and excessive taxation, skepticism of continental wars and colonial ventures

headquarters.zh: 各地乡村庄园 / 牛津大学
headquarters.en: Country estates across England / University of Oxford

relationship.zh: 托利党在1714年后因被怀疑同情詹姆斯党而长期被排除在权力核心之外。他们在下院拥有相当数量的席位，但无法形成政府。托利派议员代表乡村小地主和英国国教牧师的利益，批评辉格党的腐败、高税收和与汉诺威王朝的密切关联，主张节俭政府和传统的英格兰自由。
relationship.en: The Tories had been excluded from the center of power since 1714 due to suspected Jacobite sympathies. They held a substantial number of Commons seats but could not form a government. Tory MPs represented the interests of country squires and Church of England clergy, criticizing Whig corruption, high taxation, and close ties to the Hanoverian dynasty, and advocating frugal government and traditional English liberties.

description.zh: 托利党在18世纪中叶是一个处于长期在野状态的政治派系。自安妮女王去世、汉诺威王朝即位以来，托利党被辉格党成功地贴上了「詹姆斯党同情者」的标签而被排斥出政府。尽管许多托利派人士实际上是忠于汉诺威王朝的，但「托利=不忠」的政治偏见在乔治一世和乔治二世时代根深蒂固。托利党的政治基盘在英格兰乡村——小地主、乡村牧师和传统社区构成其核心支持者。他们在文化上与牛津大学关系密切（而辉格党与剑桥关系更近），在宗教上坚定维护英国国教的特殊地位。托利派的政治主张包括：反对常备军、主张民兵制，批评辉格政府的腐败选举操控，要求降低土地税，以及对大陆干预持孤立主义倾向。1750年前后，托利党虽已从詹姆斯党阴影中走出，但仍未能重新执政。他们对辉格寡头的持续批评在一定程度上维护了英国议会政治中的反对派传统。
description.en: The Tories in the mid-18th century were a political faction in prolonged opposition. Since Queen Anne's death and the Hanoverian accession, the Whigs had successfully branded the Tories as Jacobite sympathizers and excluded them from government. Though many Tories were in fact loyal to the Hanoverian dynasty, the political prejudice equating 'Tory' with 'disloyal' was deeply entrenched during the reigns of George I and George II. The Tory political base lay in the English countryside—minor landowners, country parsons, and traditional communities formed their core supporters. Culturally they were closely associated with the University of Oxford (while the Whigs leaned toward Cambridge), and in religion they staunchly defended the special position of the Church of England. Tory political demands included opposition to standing armies in favor of militia, criticism of Whig electoral manipulation, calls for lower land tax, and isolationist tendencies regarding continental intervention. Around 1750, the Tories had emerged from the Jacobite shadow but had not yet returned to power. Their sustained criticism of the Whig oligarchy helped preserve the opposition tradition within British parliamentary politics.

role.zh: 安妮女王时代遗留的托利派旗帜性人物，其政治遗产延续至此时
role.en: Iconic Tory figure from Queen Anne's era whose political legacy endured to this period

role.zh: 托利党地方代表的集体力量，维持反对辉格腐败的议会传统
role.en: Collective force of Tory local representatives, maintaining the parliamentary tradition of opposing Whig corruption

leader.zh: "小僭王「查尔斯·爱德华·斯图亚特

ideology.zh: 斯图亚特王朝复辟，天主教合法王权（或至少宗教宽容），苏格兰高地传统与氏族忠诚
ideology.en: Stuart dynasty restoration, Catholic legitimate kingship (or at least religious toleration), Scottish Highland traditions and clan loyalty

headquarters.zh: 罗马（流亡宫廷）/ 苏格兰高地

relationship.zh: 1745年起义被镇压后，詹姆斯党作为有组织的政治—军事力量已基本瓦解。「小僭王」查尔斯·爱德华·斯图亚特流亡欧洲大陆，苏格兰高地遭到英国政府的系统性军事镇压和文化清洗——禁止穿格纹、解除氏族武装、取消酋长司法权。残余的同情者转入地下或流亡海外。
relationship.en: After the crushing of the 1745 uprising, the Jacobites as an organized political-military force were essentially destroyed. Charles Edward Stuart ('Bonnie Prince Charlie') went into exile on the European continent, while the Scottish Highlands were subjected to systematic military suppression and cultural erasure by the British government—tartan was banned, clans were disarmed, and chieftains' judicial authority was abolished. Remaining sympathizers went underground or into exile abroad.

description.zh: 詹姆斯党运动起源于1688年光荣革命后对被废黜的斯图亚特王朝的忠诚。其名称来源于拉丁语中的「雅各布斯」（Jacobus，即詹姆斯的拉丁形式）。1745年，「小僭王」查尔斯·爱德华·斯图亚特在法国支持下登陆苏格兰高地，召集了约五千名高地氏族战士，一路南下攻克爱丁堡并深入英格兰腹地直达德比，距伦敦仅200公里。这一冒险最终在1746年卡洛登荒原战役中以惨败告终——坎伯兰公爵率领的英军以火器优势屠杀了高地军队。此后英国政府对苏格兰高地实施了极其严厉的惩罚政策：禁止格纹和高地服饰、取消氏族酋长的世袭权力、没收叛乱者的土地、建造军用道路和堡垒控制高地。「小僭王」在苏格兰流浪五个月后逃往法国，此后在欧洲大陆流亡数十年，逐渐酗酒沉沦。到1750年，詹姆斯党作为政治运动已名存实亡，但它在苏格兰文化记忆中留下了不可磨灭的浪漫印记，并深刻影响了此后的苏格兰民族认同建构。
description.en: The Jacobite movement originated from loyalty to the deposed Stuart dynasty after the Glorious Revolution of 1688. Its name derived from the Latin 'Jacobus' (the Latin form of James). In 1745, Charles Edward Stuart ('Bonnie Prince Charlie'), with French backing, landed in the Scottish Highlands, rallied some five thousand Highland clan warriors, and marched south, capturing Edinburgh and penetrating deep into England as far as Derby, just 200 kilometers from London. This gamble ended in disaster at the Battle of Culloden in 1746—the Duke of Cumberland's forces, with their superiority in firearms, slaughtered the Highland army. The British government then imposed extremely harsh punitive measures on the Scottish Highlands: banning tartan and Highland dress, abolishing chieftains' hereditary powers, confiscating rebels' lands, and building military roads and forts to control the Highlands. The 'Young Pretender' wandered Scotland for five months before escaping to France, and spent decades in continental exile, gradually declining into alcoholism. By 1750, Jacobitism as a political movement was effectively defunct, yet it left an indelible romantic imprint on Scottish cultural memory and profoundly influenced subsequent constructions of Scottish national identity.

name.zh: 查尔斯·爱德华·斯图亚特

role.zh: 1745年起义的领袖，流亡中的斯图亚特王朝代表
role.en: Leader of the 1745 uprising and Stuart dynastic representative in exile

name.zh: 西蒙·弗雷泽（洛瓦特勋爵）

role.zh: 1745年起义中最后一位被斩首的贵族叛乱者
role.en: The last nobleman to be beheaded for his role in the 1745 rebellion

governmentForm.zh: 中央集权的世袭君主制，带有等级社会与王室官僚体系特征
governmentForm.en: A centralized hereditary monarchy characterized by a hierarchical society and a royal bureaucratic system

socialStructure.zh: 社会以三级制为基础：第一等级为教士，第二等级为贵族，第三等级包括资产者、城市平民、工匠与广大农民；各等级在法律、税负与特权上差异明显
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around the Three Estates: the First Estate of clergy, the Second Estate of nobility, and the Third Estate including bourgeois, urban commoners, artisans, and the broad peasantry; legal status, taxation, and privileges differed sharply among them

rulingClass.zh: 王室、宫廷贵族、佩剑贵族、法袍贵族、高级教士及受王权任命的高级文官
rulingClass.en: The royal family, court nobility, sword nobility, robe nobility, high clergy, and senior royal officials appointed by the crown

succession.zh: 遵循波旁王朝的父系长子继承制，并受萨利克法传统约束，王位仅由男性合法继承人继承
succession.en: Succession followed Bourbon agnatic primogeniture under the Salic Law tradition, restricting inheritance of the throne to legitimate male heirs

structure.zh: 1750年的法国由国王统治，中央通过国务会议、王室秘书处、财政总署、司法机构及各省总督与财政区总督实施管理。国王在理论上拥有最高立法、行政与司法权，但政策运行依赖庞大的文官、法官、税务承包商与地方特权团体。地方上并存行省、财政区、教区、领主辖区与城市自治机构，形成高度集权与历史特权并存的行政格局
structure.en: France in 1750 was ruled by the king, with the center governing through royal councils, secretaries of state, the financial administration, judicial bodies, provincial governors, and intendants. In theory the king held supreme legislative, executive, and judicial authority, but policy depended on a large body of officials, magistrates, tax farmers, and privileged local corporations. In the provinces, provinces, généralités, parishes, seigneurial jurisdictions, and municipal bodies coexisted, producing an administrative order that combined strong centralization with entrenched historical privilege

function.zh: 协助国王处理高层决策、内政、外交、司法申诉与行政命令，包括上谕登记与政策审议
function.en: Assisted the king in high policy, internal affairs, foreign relations, judicial appeals, and administrative orders, including registration of edicts and policy deliberation

name.en: Controller-General of Finances and Fiscal Administration

function.zh: 负责王国税收、借贷、预算、间接税、盐税、关税、铸币与公共工程的总体管理
function.en: Managed the kingdom's taxation, borrowing, budgeting, indirect taxes, salt tax, customs, coinage, and public works

function.zh: 负责陆军征募、军官任命、军需、要塞体系、兵站与边防管理
function.en: Oversaw army recruitment, officer appointments, supply, fortress systems, logistics, and frontier defense

name.en: Secretary of State for the Navy

function.zh: 管理舰队、海军港口、殖民事务、海外贸易护航及海军造船
function.en: Managed the fleet, naval ports, colonial affairs, convoy protection for overseas trade, and naval construction

name.en: Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

function.zh: 负责条约、驻外使节、王朝外交、情报与对欧洲列强的关系协调
function.en: Handled treaties, embassies, dynastic diplomacy, intelligence, and relations with the European great powers

function.zh: 负责高级审判、法律登记、上诉受理及王国法令的地方实施与解释
function.en: Handled high justice, legal registration, appeals, and the local implementation and interpretation of royal law

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由各财政区总督、行省总督、市政机构、教区神职人员及领主法院共同构成。18世纪中叶的法国王权 increasingly 依赖财政区总督监督税收、治安、赈济、道路与民兵事务，但布列塔尼、朗格多克等有省级等级会议的地区仍保有较强地方传统与财政议价能力
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared among intendants, provincial governors, municipal institutions, parish clergy, and seigneurial courts. By the mid-eighteenth century the monarchy increasingly relied on intendants to supervise taxation, policing, poor relief, roads, and militia affairs, but provinces such as Brittany and Languedoc, with provincial estates, still retained significant local tradition and bargaining power over finance

legalSystem.zh: 法国法律制度高度复合。北部多遵循习惯法，南部更多沿用成文罗马法传统；王室敕令、教会法、领主司法及高等法院判例并存。巴黎高等法院等机构有权登记王令，并在政治上对王权形成有限但重要的制衡与迟滞
legalSystem.en: The French legal system was highly composite. Much of the north followed customary law, while the south relied more on written Roman-law traditions; royal ordinances, canon law, seigneurial justice, and parlementary jurisprudence coexisted. Bodies such as the Parlement of Paris had the authority to register royal edicts, creating a limited but important political check and delay on royal action

taxationSystem.zh: 税制复杂且不均，包括直接税如土地税与人头税，间接税如盐税、消费税、关税与印花税。税收征解常由税务承包体系承担，教士与大量贵族享有减免或豁免，第三等级承担主要负担，导致财政效率不足与社会不满长期积累
taxationSystem.en: The tax system was complex and uneven, including direct taxes such as the taille and capitation, and indirect taxes such as the gabelle, excises, customs, and stamp duties. Collection often relied on tax farming, while clergy and many nobles enjoyed exemptions or reductions; the Third Estate bore much of the burden, contributing to weak fiscal efficiency and long-term social resentment

religion.zh: 以罗马天主教为国教与社会主导信仰。1685年后胡格诺派合法地位已被取消，但部分新教徒仍秘密或边缘存在；王权与教会关系受加利坎主义影响，主张法国教会在某些事务上具有相对自主性
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the established religion and the dominant faith of society. After 1685 the legal standing of the Huguenots had been revoked, though some Protestants continued to exist clandestinely or on the margins; relations between crown and church were shaped by Gallicanism, which asserted a measure of autonomy for the French Church in certain matters

philosophy.zh: 法国是启蒙思想中心之一，理性主义、自然法、怀疑主义、经验主义与对专制、教权和传统偏见的批判广泛传播。孟德斯鸠、伏尔泰、狄德罗、达朗贝尔等思想家在政治理论、宗教宽容与百科全书式知识整理方面影响深远
philosophy.en: France was one of the principal centers of Enlightenment thought, where rationalism, natural law, skepticism, empiricism, and criticism of absolutism, clerical power, and inherited prejudice circulated widely. Thinkers such as Montesquieu, Voltaire, Diderot, and d'Alembert exerted deep influence on political theory, religious toleration, and encyclopedic organization of knowledge

writingSystem.zh: 采用拉丁字母书写法语，并广泛用于行政、法律、文学、学术与外交；拉丁语在教会、古典教育与部分学术场合仍具地位
writingSystem.en: French was written in the Latin alphabet and used widely in administration, law, literature, scholarship, and diplomacy; Latin still retained standing in the church, classical education, and some scholarly settings

culturalAchievements.zh: 18世纪中叶法国在文学、戏剧、哲学、建筑、园林、绘画、科学社团与沙龙文化方面居欧洲前列。巴黎成为出版、时尚、礼仪和思想传播中心，法语更成为国际外交语言之一。洛可可艺术、宫廷礼仪、百科全书编纂以及自然科学与数学研究均体现其文化影响力
culturalAchievements.en: By the mid-eighteenth century France stood at the forefront of Europe in literature, theater, philosophy, architecture, gardens, painting, learned societies, and salon culture. Paris became a center of publishing, fashion, manners, and intellectual exchange, while French emerged as one of the principal languages of international diplomacy. Rococo art, court ceremonial, the Encyclopédie project, and work in the natural sciences and mathematics all reflected this cultural influence

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言法语属于印欧语系罗曼语族；境内亦存在奥克语、布列塔尼语、巴斯克语、弗拉芒语、阿尔萨斯德语与科西嘉语等区域语言
languageFamily.en: The principal language, French, belonged to the Indo-European Romance family; regional languages within the kingdom included Occitan, Breton, Basque, Flemish, Alsatian German, and Corsican among others

unit.en: livres tournois per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 1750年前后的法国是欧洲最大的经济体之一，农业产出庞大，国内市场广阔，手工业与奢侈品制造发达，并通过大西洋贸易与殖民体系获利。尽管财政结构失衡、内部关卡与税制扭曲限制了效率，但其总体经济规模仍在欧洲名列前茅
gdpDescription.en: Around 1750 France was one of the largest economies in Europe, with enormous agricultural output, a broad internal market, developed crafts and luxury manufacture, and profits drawn from Atlantic trade and the colonial system. Although fiscal imbalance, internal customs barriers, and tax distortions limited efficiency, its overall economic scale remained among the foremost in Europe

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、葡萄酒酿造、谷物生产、纺织业、丝绸业、奢侈品制造、造船、冶金、盐业、出版业及殖民商品再出口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, wine production, grain cultivation, textiles, silk manufacture, luxury goods, shipbuilding, metallurgy, salt production, publishing, and the re-export trade in colonial goods

tradeGoods.zh: 出口葡萄酒、白兰地、丝织品、毛纺品、亚麻布、奢侈品、军用品与制成品；进口糖、咖啡、可可、烟草、靛蓝、香料、金属原料、木材及部分海军物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wine, brandy, silk fabrics, woolens, linens, luxury goods, military supplies, and manufactured wares; imports included sugar, coffee, cocoa, tobacco, indigo, spices, metal inputs, timber, and certain naval stores

householdWealth.zh: 财富分布极不均衡。大批农户拥有少量土地或租佃耕作，容易受歉收、地租和税负冲击；城市资产者、金融家、官职持有者与商人积累了显著财富；贵族与教会掌握大量地产与租税特权
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was distributed very unevenly. Many peasants held small plots or farmed as tenants and were vulnerable to poor harvests, rents, and taxes; urban bourgeois families, financiers, officeholders, and merchants accumulated significant wealth; nobles and the church controlled large landed resources and fiscal privileges

unit.en: livres tournois per person per year

unit.zh: 百万利弗尔图尔努瓦/年

economicSystem.zh: 以农业为基础、受王权调控与特许制度影响的前工业混合经济。重商主义政策仍有强烈影响，国家通过行会、关税、垄断特许、海军保护与殖民贸易规则干预市场，但区域市场化和私人资本活动也日益增强
economicSystem.en: A preindustrial mixed economy based on agriculture and shaped by royal regulation and chartered privilege. Mercantilist policy remained strongly influential, with the state intervening through guilds, tariffs, monopolies, naval protection, and colonial trade rules, while regional market integration and private capital activity were also expanding

source.zh: 官职出售、封赏与杂项收入
source.en: Sale of offices, fees, and miscellaneous revenue

source.zh: 教会捐助与其他非常规来源
source.en: Clerical contributions and other extraordinary sources

category.en: Court, royal household, and ceremonial spending

category.zh: 道路、赈济与其他公共事务
category.en: Roads, relief, and other public affairs

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室国库并非现代意义上的统一透明财政储备，而是由现金、短期借款能力、预征税款与复杂债务安排共同构成。1750年法国财政在表面稳定下承受长期战争债务与税制低效的压力
treasuryDescription.en: The royal treasury was not a unified and transparent reserve in the modern sense, but a combination of cash, short-term borrowing capacity, anticipated tax receipts, and complex debt arrangements. In 1750 French finance appeared outwardly stable, yet remained burdened by the legacy of war debt and fiscal inefficiency

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持信用、保障军费与宫廷支出、通过税务承包和借贷弥补结构性缺口为主。改革呼声渐强，但特权阶层、司法机构和既得利益网络使税制均衡化与财政现代化进展有限
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on maintaining credit, funding the military and court, and covering structural deficits through tax farming and borrowing. Pressure for reform was growing, but privileged orders, judicial bodies, and entrenched interests limited progress toward a more even tax system and modernized finance

description.zh: 法国陆军是欧洲最大常备军之一，包括步兵、骑兵、炮兵、工兵、边境要塞守备部队及皇家近卫。军官职位多由贵族主导，训练与制服制度较成熟，但补给与财政持续性受制于国家财政状况
description.en: The French Army was one of the largest standing forces in Europe, including infantry, cavalry, artillery, engineers, frontier fortress garrisons, and royal guards. Officer posts were heavily dominated by nobles, and systems of training and uniforms were relatively developed, though supply and sustainability were constrained by the state of public finance

description.zh: 法国海军在大西洋与地中海均有重要存在，依托布雷斯特、土伦与罗什福尔等港口，承担海上作战、护航、殖民防御与跨洋运输任务。1750年海军正在重建与整备中，尚未达到战争高峰时期规模
description.en: The French Navy maintained an important presence in both the Atlantic and Mediterranean, relying on ports such as Brest, Toulon, and Rochefort for naval warfare, convoy protection, colonial defense, and transoceanic transport. In 1750 the navy was in a phase of reconstruction and preparation, not yet at the scale reached during wartime peaks

description.zh: 地方民兵与辅助部队用于治安、后备征发、沿海警戒与边境支援，战斗力与训练程度不及正规军，但在动员体系中具有补充作用
description.en: Provincial militia and auxiliary units served in policing, reserve levies, coastal watch, and frontier support; their combat quality and training were below that of regular troops, but they played a supplementary role in mobilization

commanderInChief.zh: 路易十五国王（名义最高统帅），实际由战争国务大臣与元帅体系统筹
commanderInChief.en: King Louis XV (nominal commander-in-chief), with practical direction exercised through the Secretary of State for War and the marshalate

technology.zh: 法国军队装备燧发枪、线列步兵战术、野战与攻城火炮、沃邦体系遗产下的要塞工程、专业工兵与较成熟的军服后勤制度。海军使用风帆战列舰与舰炮体系，造船和炮术水准属欧洲前列
technology.en: French forces used flintlock muskets, line infantry tactics, field and siege artillery, fortress engineering shaped by the legacy of Vauban, professional engineers, and a relatively mature system of uniforms and logistics. The navy operated sailing ships of the line and broadside gunnery systems, with shipbuilding and artillery standards among the best in Europe

threats.zh: 主要战略威胁来自与大不列颠王国的海外与海上竞争、与哈布斯堡君主国及普鲁士相关的欧洲大陆均势问题，以及殖民地与贸易航线的安全压力。法国同时需警惕国内财政脆弱对长期战争动员能力的削弱
threats.en: The main strategic threats came from maritime and overseas rivalry with Great Britain, continental balance-of-power issues involving the Habsburg Monarchy and Prussia, and the need to secure colonies and trade routes. France also had to reckon with the weakening effect of domestic fiscal fragility on its ability to sustain prolonged war

populationDescription.zh: 法国约有2400万人，是当时欧洲人口最多的国家之一。人口绝大多数生活于农村，以农业劳动为主；若干地区在18世纪上半叶保持增长，但粮食供应、地方疾病与收成波动仍深刻影响人口稳定性
populationDescription.en: With about 24 million inhabitants, France was one of the most populous states in Europe. The great majority lived in the countryside and worked primarily in agriculture; several regions sustained growth during the first half of the eighteenth century, but food supply, local disease environments, and harvest fluctuations still deeply affected demographic stability

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层可概括为教士、贵族、城市资产阶级、工匠与行会成员、城市贫民、佃农、自耕农及无地农工。身份、财产与特权高度交织，城市中买官贵族与富裕资产阶级的界线常有流动，但整体秩序仍明显不平等
socialClasses.en: Social classes may be summarized as clergy, nobility, urban bourgeoisie, artisans and guild members, the urban poor, tenant farmers, peasant proprietors, and landless agricultural laborers. Status, property, and privilege were tightly intertwined; in towns the boundaries between office-holding nobility and wealthy bourgeois could be fluid, yet the overall order remained markedly unequal

allies.zh: 1750年法国与波旁西班牙维持紧密王朝联系，并在欧洲外交中寻求与若干意大利邦国、瑞典及部分反英或均势伙伴合作
allies.en: In 1750 France maintained close dynastic ties with Bourbon Spain and sought cooperation in European diplomacy with certain Italian states, Sweden, and other partners aligned against British influence or in favor of balance-of-power objectives

enemies.zh: 最主要的对手是大不列颠王国，尤其在海洋、殖民地和商业领域；在欧洲大陆，法国也长期与哈布斯堡君主国存在战略竞争，并密切关注普鲁士与俄罗斯势力变化
enemies.en: Its principal rival was Great Britain, especially in maritime, colonial, and commercial affairs; on the European continent France had long been in strategic competition with the Habsburg Monarchy and closely watched the changing power of Prussia and Russia

foreignPolicy.zh: 法国对外政策以维持欧洲均势、遏制英国海上与殖民扩张、保护波旁王朝利益、维护边疆安全并扩大海外商业影响为核心。外交上兼用王朝联姻、条约、补贴与战争威慑，是18世纪典型大国博弈的中心参与者
foreignPolicy.en: French foreign policy centered on maintaining the European balance of power, containing British maritime and colonial expansion, protecting Bourbon dynastic interests, securing the frontiers, and enlarging overseas commercial influence. It relied on dynastic ties, treaties, subsidies, and military pressure, making France a central participant in eighteenth-century great-power politics

era.zh: 启蒙时代

keyInnovations.zh: 法国在数学、天文学、物理学、工程学、制图、炮兵学、造船与出版传播方面处于欧洲先进水平。科学院体系、精密仪器制作、百科全书知识整理、要塞工程传统与改良农业知识传播，构成其技术实力的重要基础
keyInnovations.en: France stood at an advanced European level in mathematics, astronomy, physics, engineering, cartography, artillery science, shipbuilding, and print culture. The academy system, precision instrument making, encyclopedic organization of knowledge, the tradition of fortress engineering, and the spread of improved agricultural knowledge formed key pillars of its technological strength

strengths.zh: 人口众多、农业基础雄厚、文化影响力巨大、军队规模庞大、外交地位显赫、制造业与奢侈品产业发达，并拥有重要海军和殖民潜力
strengths.en: It possessed a large population, a strong agricultural base, immense cultural influence, a large military establishment, high diplomatic standing, developed manufacturing and luxury industries, and significant naval and colonial potential

weaknesses.zh: 税制不公且效率低下、债务负担沉重、地方特权与行政碎片化阻碍改革、社会等级不平等尖锐、国内市场仍受内地关卡与制度壁垒限制
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included an inequitable and inefficient tax system, a heavy debt burden, local privilege and administrative fragmentation that obstructed reform, sharp social inequality, and an internal market still hindered by internal customs barriers and institutional obstacles

outlook.zh: 1750年的法国总体稳定且仍是欧洲最强大的王国之一，但这种稳定建立在财政脆弱与社会不平等之上。若能推进税制和行政改革，王国仍有巨大潜力；若长期战争与改革受阻并存，未来数十年将积累深刻政治与社会危机
outlook.en: In 1750 France was broadly stable and remained one of the most powerful kingdoms in Europe, but that stability rested on fiscal fragility and social inequality. If it could carry through tax and administrative reform, the kingdom retained enormous potential; if prolonged war continued alongside blocked reform, the coming decades would accumulate profound political and social crisis

description.zh: 欧洲人口最多的王国之一，也是启蒙思想传播的核心地区。
description.en: One of Europe's most populous kingdoms and a central heartland of Enlightenment thought.

ideology.zh: 绝对君主制传统延续，凡尔赛宫廷政治，皇家庇护与宠臣体系，对外争霸与殖民扩张
ideology.en: Continuation of absolute monarchy tradition, Versailles court politics, royal patronage and favorites system, great-power rivalry and colonial expansion

relationship.zh: 路易十五在弗勒里枢机去世后（1743年）亲政，但对日常政务兴趣不稳定，大量决策受蓬帕杜尔夫人和宠臣集团影响。王廷通过官僚体系、包税商和地方总督维持对全国的统治，但高等法院的抵制和启蒙思想的传播正在侵蚀绝对主义的合法性基础。
relationship.en: Louis XV assumed personal rule after the death of Cardinal Fleury (1743) but his attention to daily governance was uneven, and many decisions were shaped by Madame de Pompadour and courtier factions. The crown maintained national control through the bureaucracy, tax farmers, and provincial intendants, but resistance from the parlements and the spread of Enlightenment thought were eroding the legitimacy foundations of absolutism.

description.zh: 路易十五（1710—1774）是法国历史上最具争议的国王之一。他在位五十九年（1715—1774），是路易十四之后法国绝对君主制由盛转衰的关键时期。少年时代由奥尔良摄政公爵和弗勒里枢机先后辅政，成年亲政后表现出聪明但缺乏持久意志的特点。蓬帕杜尔夫人（1721—1764）作为他最具影响力的情妇，在1745年至1764年间深度介入政治决策、文化庇护和外交方向——她推动了法奥联盟（「外交革命」）和对启蒙知识分子的保护。凡尔赛宫廷的运转消耗了巨额财政，数千名贵族在凡尔赛竞逐国王的恩宠，形成了一个远离社会现实的封闭权力世界。与此同时，七年战争的失败（失去加拿大和印度大部分殖民地）严重损害了法国的国际地位和国内威信。1750年正值蓬帕杜尔夫人影响力的高峰时期，法国外交正从传统的反哈布斯堡路线转向新的法奥同盟。
description.en: Louis XV (1710–1774) was one of the most controversial kings in French history. His fifty-nine-year reign (1715–1774) marked the critical transition of French absolute monarchy from its peak to decline after Louis XIV. Governed in his youth by the Duke of Orléans as regent and then by Cardinal Fleury, he showed intelligence but lacked sustained willpower upon assuming personal rule. Madame de Pompadour (1721–1764), his most influential mistress, was deeply involved in political decisions, cultural patronage, and diplomatic direction from 1745 to 1764—she promoted the Franco-Austrian alliance (the 'Diplomatic Revolution') and the protection of Enlightenment intellectuals. The operations of the Versailles court consumed enormous fiscal resources, with thousands of nobles competing for royal favor in a closed world of power detached from social reality. Meanwhile, defeat in the Seven Years' War (losing Canada and most Indian colonies) severely damaged France's international standing and domestic prestige. Around 1750, at the height of Pompadour's influence, French diplomacy was pivoting from the traditional anti-Habsburg line toward a new Franco-Austrian alliance.

role.zh: 法兰西绝对君主，在位期间国力由盛转衰
role.en: Absolute monarch of France, during whose reign national power shifted from zenith to decline

role.zh: 政治顾问、文化庇护者和外交方向的重要影响者
role.en: Political advisor, cultural patron, and significant influence on diplomatic direction

name.zh: 启蒙哲人 / 启蒙运动

leaderTitle.zh: 哲学家 / 百科全书主编

ideology.zh: 理性主义，宗教宽容与反教权主义，自然权利，科学进步，社会契约论，通过知识改良社会
ideology.en: Rationalism, religious tolerance and anticlericalism, natural rights, scientific progress, social contract theory, and social improvement through knowledge

relationship.zh: 启蒙哲人群体并非一个统一的组织，而是由共享理性主义与批判精神的知识分子组成的松散网络。他们通过著作、百科全书、沙龙和跨国通信传播新思想，对旧制度的政治、宗教和社会基础提出系统性质疑。王权对他们态度矛盾——蓬帕杜尔夫人保护百科全书派，但教会和保守势力多次推动查禁其著作。
relationship.en: The philosophes were not a unified organization but a loose network of intellectuals sharing rationalist and critical convictions. They disseminated new ideas through writings, the Encyclopédie, salons, and transnational correspondence, mounting a systematic challenge to the political, religious, and social foundations of the Ancien Régime. The crown's attitude toward them was ambivalent—Madame de Pompadour protected the Encyclopédistes, while the church and conservative forces repeatedly sought to suppress their works.

description.zh: 法国启蒙运动（Les Lumières）是18世纪欧洲最深刻的思想变革之一，其影响远超法国边界，重塑了整个西方文明的政治与文化框架。1750年前后正是启蒙运动从思想酝酿走向全面爆发的关键转折期。伏尔泰（1694—1778）已是欧洲最负盛名的知识分子，他以尖刻的讽刺笔法攻击宗教不宽容和政治专制，在各国宫廷间奔走，与腓特烈大帝等开明君主保持密切交往。孟德斯鸠的《论法的精神》（1748年）系统阐述了三权分立学说，深刻影响了后世的宪政思想。让-雅克·卢梭的社会契约论和自然状态理论正在成形。最具象征意义的是德尼·狄德罗和让·勒朗·达朗贝尔主编的《百科全书》（1751年开始出版），这部旨在系统总结人类全部知识的巨著，汇聚了一百五十余位撰稿人，不仅是一部参考工具书，更是一份挑战传统权威、宣扬理性与进步的思想宣言。启蒙哲人的核心主张——理性取代迷信、宽容取代偏执、进步取代停滞——在1750年的法国社会中引发了日益激烈的思想论战，为四十年后的大革命准备了思想弹药。
description.en: The French Enlightenment (Les Lumières) was one of the most profound intellectual transformations of 18th-century Europe, its influence extending far beyond France to reshape the political and cultural framework of all Western civilization. Around 1750 was the critical turning point when the Enlightenment shifted from intellectual gestation to full eruption. Voltaire (1694–1778) was already Europe's most celebrated intellectual, wielding caustic satire against religious intolerance and political despotism, traveling between courts and maintaining close contact with enlightened monarchs such as Frederick the Great. Montesquieu's Spirit of the Laws (1748) systematically articulated the doctrine of separation of powers, profoundly influencing later constitutional thought. Jean-Jacques Rousseau's social contract theory and state-of-nature philosophy were taking shape. Most symbolically, Denis Diderot and Jean le Rond d'Alembert's Encyclopédie (publication beginning 1751), a monumental work aiming to systematically compile all human knowledge with over 150 contributors, was not merely a reference tool but an intellectual manifesto challenging traditional authority and proclaiming reason and progress. The philosophes' core propositions—reason replacing superstition, tolerance replacing bigotry, progress replacing stagnation—were provoking increasingly fierce intellectual debate in French society around 1750, preparing the intellectual ammunition for the Revolution forty years later.

role.zh: 启蒙运动最具代表性的知识分子，宗教宽容和言论自由的旗手
role.en: The most representative intellectual of the Enlightenment, champion of religious tolerance and freedom of speech

role.zh: 百科全书派的灵魂人物，启蒙知识总汇的组织者
role.en: Animating figure of the Encyclopédistes and organizer of the Enlightenment knowledge compendium

title.zh: 法学家 / 政治哲学家

role.zh: 三权分立学说的奠基人，《论法的精神》作者
role.en: Founder of the separation of powers doctrine, author of The Spirit of the Laws

role.zh: 社会契约论者，自然状态与人民主权思想的倡导者
role.en: Social contract theorist and advocate of the state of nature and popular sovereignty

name.zh: 高等法院 / 法袍贵族

leader.en: First President of the Parlement of Paris

ideology.zh: 法国「古老宪政」传统维护，高等法院登记权与谏诤权，抵制王室税收改革，世袭法官权利
ideology.en: Defense of France's 'ancient constitution' tradition, parlementary rights of registration and remonstrance, resistance to royal tax reform, hereditary judicial privileges

relationship.zh: 高等法院以其对王室法令的登记权为武器，多次拒绝登记新税法令和宗教政策，实际上构成了对绝对君主制的制度性制衡。路易十五与高等法院之间的冲突贯穿其整个统治时期——国王偶尔动用「强制御令」（lit de justice）强行通过法令，但高等法院始终坚持其谏诤传统。
relationship.en: The parlements used their right of registration of royal edicts as a weapon, repeatedly refusing to register new tax decrees and religious policies, effectively constituting an institutional check on absolute monarchy. The conflict between Louis XV and the parlements ran throughout his reign—the king occasionally invoked the lit de justice to force edicts through, but the parlements persistently upheld their tradition of remonstrance.

description.zh: 法国高等法院（Parlements）是旧制度下最重要的司法—政治机构，以巴黎高等法院为首，全国共有十三个高等法院。它们名义上是最高司法法庭，但其政治影响力主要来自对王室法令的「登记权」——任何新法律须经高等法院登记方能生效。高等法院法官的职位是可以买卖和世袭的（卖官制度，paulette），这使他们成为一个自成体系的「法袍贵族」阶层，其权力基础独立于王权恩赐。到18世纪中叶，高等法院日益频繁地行使「谏诤权」（droit de remontrance），拒绝登记国王的新税法令和有争议的宗教政策（特别是涉及冉森主义的教令）。他们的抵制以「法国古老宪政」为理论依据，声称自己代表国家的根本法律传统来约束王权。路易十五多次与高等法院发生正面冲突，1753年甚至一度流放巴黎高等法院法官。这场王权与司法贵族之间的持续斗争，是导致旧制度财政改革屡屡受挫的核心原因之一，也为1789年大革命中三级会议的召开埋下了伏笔。高等法院既是保守特权的维护者（抵制有利于社会公平的改革），又在客观上扮演了限制专制权力的角色，这种矛盾性是旧制度政治的一个缩影。
description.en: The French Parlements were the most important judicial-political institutions of the Ancien Régime, led by the Parlement of Paris with thirteen parlements nationwide. Nominally supreme courts of justice, their political influence derived primarily from the right of registration—any new law required parlementary registration to take effect. Parlementary offices were venal and hereditary (the paulette system), making the magistrates a self-sustaining 'robe nobility' whose power base was independent of royal favor. By the mid-18th century, the parlements increasingly exercised their droit de remontrance, refusing to register royal tax edicts and controversial religious policies (particularly those concerning Jansenism). They justified their resistance by invoking France's 'ancient constitution,' claiming to represent the nation's fundamental legal traditions as a check on royal power. Louis XV clashed with the parlements repeatedly, at one point exiling the Parlement of Paris magistrates in 1753. This ongoing struggle between crown and judicial aristocracy was a core reason why Ancien Régime fiscal reform was repeatedly thwarted, and it laid the groundwork for the convocation of the Estates-General in 1789. The parlements simultaneously defended conservative privilege (resisting reforms beneficial to social equity) and objectively served as a check on despotic power—this paradox encapsulated the contradictions of Ancien Régime politics.

name.zh: 巴黎高等法院法官群体

role.zh: 以登记权与谏诤权为工具抵制王室改革的司法贵族集团
role.en: Judicial aristocratic body using registration and remonstrance rights to resist royal reform

role.zh: 反冉森主义斗争中教会与高等法院冲突的焦点人物
role.en: Central figure in the clash between church and parlements over anti-Jansenist policies

governmentForm.zh: 波旁王朝下的复合君主制与集权改革中的世袭天主教君主国，统治伊比利亚本土及广阔的美洲与海外领地。
governmentForm.en: A hereditary Catholic monarchy under the Bourbon dynasty, organized as a composite monarchy undergoing centralizing reforms, ruling the Iberian homeland together with vast American and overseas dominions.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与高等贵族、教士、城市法学与官僚阶层、商人与行会手工业者、农民及殖民地的复杂种姓与法定身份群体构成；本土旧有地方特权仍存，但王权正逐步削弱其政治自主性。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the royal house and high nobility, clergy, urban legal and bureaucratic elites, merchants and guild artisans, peasants, and in the colonies a complex hierarchy of castes and legally defined status groups; traditional local privileges still survived in parts of the peninsula, but royal power was steadily reducing their political autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 国王、国务大臣、宫廷贵族、高级教士、王室法学官僚以及在西班牙与印第亚斯行政机构中任职的高级文官共同构成统治阶层。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the king, royal ministers, court nobility, senior clergy, crown jurists, and high civil officials serving in the administrative institutions of both Spain and the Indies.

succession.zh: 男性优先的王朝世袭继承，依波旁王朝的半萨利克继承原则，由合法王室成员按血统顺序承继王位。
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession with male preference, following the Bourbon semi-Salic order by which legitimate royal family members inherited the throne according to bloodline precedence.

structure.zh: 1750年的西班牙政府以国王为核心，由国务秘书与各专门秘书处、卡斯蒂利亚与印第亚斯等传统议政机构、王室财政机关、陆海军行政体系以及地方总督、科雷希多尔与殖民地总督—总司令网络构成。波旁改革正在以更统一、更职业化的官僚体系取代哈布斯堡时代更分散的多法域治理。
structure.en: The Spanish government in 1750 was centered on the king and composed of the Secretaries of State and Dispatch, traditional deliberative councils such as those of Castile and the Indies, royal financial bodies, military and naval administrations, and a territorial network of captains general, corregidores, and colonial viceroys and governors. The Bourbon reforms were gradually replacing the more fragmented Habsburg-era polycentric order with a more unified and professional bureaucracy.

name.zh: 国务与对外事务秘书处

function.zh: 负责外交、宫廷政治协调、王室诏令传达以及与欧洲列强的往来。
function.en: Handled diplomacy, coordination of high court politics, transmission of royal orders, and relations with European powers.

name.zh: 恩典、司法与教务秘书处
name.en: Secretariat of Grace, Justice, and Ecclesiastical Affairs

function.zh: 管理司法任命、王室恩典、教会事务、大学与部分审判协调。
function.en: Managed judicial appointments, royal patronage, ecclesiastical affairs, universities, and part of judicial coordination.

function.zh: 征收本土税赋、监督国债与收入承包、管理军费拨付及王室预算。
function.en: Collected peninsular taxes, supervised public debt and tax farming, managed military disbursements, and oversaw the royal budget.

function.zh: 负责陆军征募、驻防、军官任命、军需、工兵与边防要塞。
function.en: Oversaw army recruitment, garrisons, officer appointments, supply, engineers, and frontier fortifications.

name.zh: 海军与印第亚斯秘书处
name.en: Secretariat of the Navy and the Indies

function.zh: 负责舰队、造船、海军基地、美洲殖民行政协调、跨大西洋航运与帝国防务。
function.en: Supervised fleets, shipbuilding, naval bases, colonial coordination in the Americas, transatlantic shipping, and imperial defense.

name.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚会议与附属司法行政机关
name.en: Council of Castile and Attached Judicial Administration

function.zh: 处理王国主要法政事务、地方治理监督、法令解释与上诉。
function.en: Handled major legal and political affairs of the kingdom, supervised local governance, interpreted laws, and heard appeals.

name.zh: 印第亚斯会议及殖民档案行政机构
name.en: Council of the Indies and Colonial Administrative Offices

function.zh: 负责殖民立法咨询、人事、司法上诉与美洲行政文书管理。
function.en: Provided advice on colonial legislation, appointments, judicial appeals, and the management of American administrative records.

localAdmin.zh: 本土行政以省级总司令区、王家法庭辖区、科雷希多尔、阿尔卡尔德与市镇议会为基础；阿拉贡旧制已在新基本法后大体并入王室统一体制。美洲则由新西班牙与秘鲁等总督区统辖，下设王家法庭、省长、市镇会与王室财政官。1750年时，意向上的总督辖区与财政监察改革已在酝酿并部分试行，但尚未达到后期波旁改革的全面成熟。
localAdmin.en: Local administration in the peninsula rested on captaincies general, audiencia jurisdictions, corregidores, alcaldes, and municipal councils; the old Aragonese institutions had largely been absorbed into a more uniform royal system after the Nueva Planta decrees. In the Americas, governance operated through viceroyalties such as New Spain and Peru, together with audiencias, governors, cabildos, and royal treasury officials. By 1750, the tendency toward tighter fiscal oversight and more governor-intendant style administration was emerging, though not yet fully developed.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为复合法制，结合《七章法》传统、卡斯蒂利亚法、王室敕令、教会法、地方习惯以及印第亚斯法。高等法院与王家法庭在本土和殖民地均具关键作用，国王被视为最高司法源泉。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was plural and composite, combining the tradition of the Siete Partidas, Castilian law, royal decrees, canon law, local custom, and the Laws of the Indies. High tribunals and audiencias played central roles both in Spain and overseas, while the king was regarded as the ultimate source of justice.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以间接税、销售税、关税、烟草与盐等专卖收入、教会让渡、殖民贸易税与美洲贵金属相关收入为主。本土不同地区税制不一，卡斯蒂利亚承担较重负担；王室亦依赖借贷、收入预支和特许经营。波旁改革正努力提高征收效率、打击逃税并扩大财政直接控制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on indirect levies, sales taxes, customs duties, monopolies such as tobacco and salt, ecclesiastical transfers, colonial trade duties, and revenues linked to American precious metals. Fiscal regimes varied by region, with Castile bearing a particularly heavy burden; the Crown also depended on borrowing, revenue advances, and concessions. Bourbon reform sought to improve collection, reduce evasion, and expand direct royal control.

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为国教，王室通过保教权深度干预教会任命与殖民传教。宗教裁判所仍在运作，宗教统一被视为国家秩序的重要支柱。
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the state religion, and the Crown intervened deeply in church appointments and colonial missions through royal patronage rights. The Inquisition remained active, and religious unity was treated as a pillar of public order.

philosophy.zh: 主流思想仍为天主教经院传统、王权主义与法律官僚理性，但启蒙思潮正通过宫廷、学会、海军学院和部分改革官员渗入，强调有用知识、国家富强、经验科学与温和改革。
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought remained rooted in Catholic scholasticism, royalism, and legal-bureaucratic reason, but Enlightenment ideas were increasingly entering through the court, learned societies, naval academies, and reformist officials, emphasizing useful knowledge, national improvement, empirical science, and moderate reform.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写的西班牙语为国家主要行政语言，拉丁语仍见于教会、学术与部分法学传统；在帝国范围内亦存在加泰罗尼亚语、巴斯克语、加利西亚语及大量美洲原住民书写与口语传统。
writingSystem.en: Spanish written in the Latin alphabet was the principal language of administration, while Latin remained present in ecclesiastical, scholarly, and some legal contexts; across the empire there were also Catalan, Basque, Galician, and many indigenous American written and oral traditions.

culturalAchievements.zh: 18世纪中叶的西班牙文化成就体现在王家学院体系、历史与语言编纂、宗教与宫廷艺术、军事与航海制图、皇家工厂、戏剧与音乐传统，以及对美洲城市、教堂和大学网络的持续塑造。波旁时期还推动了更具法国影响的宫廷礼仪、建筑趣味和行政文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Mid-eighteenth-century Spanish cultural achievement appeared in the royal academies, historical and linguistic scholarship, religious and courtly arts, military and nautical cartography, royal manufactories, theatrical and musical traditions, and the continued shaping of urban, ecclesiastical, and university networks in the Americas. The Bourbon era also promoted more French-influenced court ritual, architecture, and administrative culture.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属于印欧语系罗曼语族，即西班牙语；帝国内同时涵盖多种伊比利亚和美洲本地语言。
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Indo-European Romance family, namely Spanish; the empire also encompassed many Iberian and indigenous American languages.

unit.zh: 百万国际美元（1990年盖瑞-卡哈马斯口径估算）
国际美元（1990年盖瑞-卡哈马斯口径估算）

gdpDescription.zh: 1750年的西班牙本土经济在欧洲属中上水平，但明显落后于英国与荷兰的商业化程度。其优势在于庞大帝国市场、对美洲金银与殖民贸易的制度性控制、安达卢西亚和卡斯蒂利亚的农业产出、加泰罗尼亚与巴斯克地区正在增长的制造与航运能力，以及国家主导的海军与军工投资。与此同时，地区壁垒、交通不足、税制复杂与特权结构仍限制整体生产率。
gdpDescription.en: In 1750 the peninsular Spanish economy ranked at a middling-to-upper level within Europe, though it lagged behind Britain and the Dutch Republic in commercialization. Its strengths lay in its vast imperial market, institutional control over American bullion and colonial trade, agricultural output in Andalusia and Castile, growing manufacturing and maritime capacity in Catalonia and the Basque regions, and state-led investment in naval and military production. At the same time, regional barriers, poor transport, fiscal complexity, and entrenched privilege still constrained overall productivity.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、羊毛业、葡萄酒与橄榄油生产、加的斯转口贸易、造船业、海军军工、烟草加工、纺织业、采矿与殖民贸易行政服务。
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, livestock raising, the wool sector, wine and olive oil production, re-export trade through Cádiz, shipbuilding, naval war industries, tobacco processing, textiles, mining, and administrative services tied to colonial commerce.

tradeGoods.zh: 输出羊毛、葡萄酒、橄榄油、铁制品、盐、部分纺织品和殖民转口商品；输入美洲白银、黄金、可可、靛蓝、糖、烟草、染料、皮革，以及来自欧洲和亚洲的布匹、奢侈品和海军物资。
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wool, wine, olive oil, iron goods, salt, some textiles, and colonial re-export items; imports included American silver, gold, cacao, indigo, sugar, tobacco, dyestuffs, hides, and European and Asian textiles, luxury goods, and naval materials.

name.zh: 西班牙雷亚尔与比索体系

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富高度不均。乡村家庭多以土地使用权、牲畜、农具和谷物储备为主要资产；城市家庭则以现金、工具、商货、房屋租赁权和行会资格为主。贵族与教会拥有大量地产与地租收入，美洲贸易商人积累了更高流动资本。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Rural families held value mainly in land-use rights, livestock, tools, and grain stores, while urban households relied more on cash, implements, merchandise, tenancy rights, and guild standing. Nobles and ecclesiastical institutions controlled extensive landed wealth and rents, and merchants linked to American trade accumulated greater liquid capital.

unit.zh: 百万比索/年（帝国与对外贸易总额粗估）
unit.en: million pesos per year (rough estimate of imperial and foreign trade)

economicSystem.zh: 王权主导的重商主义帝国经济。国家通过舰队、港口管制、专卖、关税、贸易许可和殖民垄断维持财政与战略利益，同时逐渐尝试推动制造业、港口现代化与行政理性化。
economicSystem.en: A crown-directed mercantilist imperial economy. The state pursued fiscal and strategic goals through fleets, port regulation, monopolies, customs, trade licensing, and colonial exclusivity, while gradually attempting to foster manufacturing, modernize ports, and rationalize administration.

source.en: Monopolies such as tobacco and salt

source.zh: 美洲财政汇入与贵金属相关收入
source.en: Transfers from American treasuries and bullion-related income

category.zh: 宫廷、王室工程与宗教支持
category.en: Court, royal works, and religious support

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况在费尔南多六世早期相对稳健，受益于和平政策、财政整顿和美洲收入恢复。尽管王室仍背负结构性债务与地区税制低效问题，但较前一时期战争年代的紧张局面已有明显改善。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury in the early reign of Ferdinand VI was relatively sound, benefiting from a peaceful foreign policy, fiscal reorganization, and recovering American revenues. Although the Crown still carried structural debt and suffered from inefficient regional tax systems, conditions were markedly improved compared with the strain of earlier wartime years.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏谨慎保守：维持和平以节省军费、整顿税务、提高专卖和海关效率、减少浪费，并在不过度触怒特权集团的前提下推进有限度集中化改革。
