gdpDescription.en: Based on livestock, agriculture, and trade; raiding economy was declining.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、谷物种植、盐业、皮革工艺、黑海贸易
mainIndustries.en: Livestock, grain cultivation, salt production, leatherwork, Black Sea trade

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、盐、皮革、谷物、奴隶（减少中）
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, salt, leather, grain, slaves (declining)

name.zh: 奥斯曼阿克切与本地铸币

householdWealth.zh: 贝伊家族拥有大量土地和牲畜；牧民和农民生活简朴。
householdWealth.en: Bey families held extensive land and livestock; pastoralists and farmers lived simply.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 游牧-农耕-商业混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A nomadic-agrarian-commercial mixed economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 以实物和少量硬币储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Reserves in goods and a small amount of coin.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持骑兵力量和汗国独立。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained cavalry strength and khanate independence.

description.zh: 以快速机动的轻骑兵为核心。
description.en: Light cavalry with rapid mobility as the core.

description.zh: 沿海要塞与城镇守备。
description.en: Coastal fortress and town garrisons.

commanderInChief.zh: 汗阿尔斯兰·吉莱
commanderInChief.en: Khan Arslan Giray

technology.zh: 以骑兵弓箭和火器混合使用，机动性强但火力不及俄军。
technology.en: Mixed cavalry archery and firearms; high mobility but inferior firepower to Russian forces.

threats.zh: 俄国南下扩张是最大威胁，叶卡捷琳娜二世时代将吞并汗国（1783年）。
threats.en: Russian southern expansion was the greatest threat; Catherine the Great's era would annex the khanate (1783).

populationDescription.zh: 人口约50万，以克里米亚鞑靼人为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 500,000, predominantly Crimean Tatars.

socialClasses.zh: 汗与吉莱王族、贝伊与穆尔扎、教士与学者、牧民与农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Khan and Giray royals, beys and mirzas, clergy and scholars, pastoralists and farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 奥斯曼帝国为宗主国和主要盟友。
allies.en: Ottoman Empire was suzerain and main ally.

enemies.zh: 俄国为最大威胁和历史对手。
enemies.en: Russia was the greatest threat and historic adversary.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在奥斯曼保护下抵御俄国扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Resisted Russian expansion under Ottoman protection.

era.zh: 后金帐汗国的突厥-伊斯兰汗国

keyInnovations.zh: 骑兵战术、清真寺与宫殿建筑、伊斯兰学校。
keyInnovations.en: Cavalry tactics, mosque and palace architecture, Islamic schools.

strengths.zh: 强大骑兵传统、奥斯曼支持、战略位置控制黑海北岸。
strengths.en: Strong cavalry tradition, Ottoman support, strategic position controlling Black Sea's northern shore.

weaknesses.zh: 俄国军事压力日增、经济落后于北方邻国、传统掠夺经济不可持续。
weaknesses.en: Growing Russian military pressure, economy lagging behind northern neighbors, traditional raiding economy unsustainable.

outlook.zh: 克里米亚汗国面临俄国吞并的严峻威胁，其独立前景令人担忧。
outlook.en: The Crimean Khanate faced a severe Russian annexation threat; its independence prospects were concerning.

description.zh: 1750年的克里米亚汗国是黑海北岸的奥斯曼附庸突厥汗国，正面临俄国南下扩张的日益严峻威胁。
description.en: In 1750 the Crimean Khanate was an Ottoman vassal Turkic khanate on the northern Black Sea, facing increasingly severe Russian southward expansion.

ruler.zh: 赛法瓦朝迈（名义）/ 实权大臣

governmentForm.zh: 以赛法瓦王朝迈为名义元首的传统伊斯兰帝国，但此时王朝权力已衰落。
governmentForm.en: A traditional Islamic empire with the Sayfawa Mai as nominal head, but dynastic power had declined.

socialStructure.zh: 穆斯林学者精英、武士贵族、商人、农民、牧民、奴隶。
socialStructure.en: Muslim scholarly elite, warrior aristocrats, merchants, farmers, pastoralists, slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 赛法瓦王室与宫廷大臣
rulingClass.en: Sayfawa royals and court ministers

succession.zh: 迈位在赛法瓦家族内继承。
succession.en: Mai-ship inherited within the Sayfawa family.

structure.zh: 迈通过宫廷大臣和伊斯兰法官治理，王权已被宫廷势力分割。
structure.en: Mai governed through court ministers and Islamic judges; royal power had been divided by court factions.

function.zh: 国政中枢
function.en: State affairs center

function.zh: 法律与宗教
function.en: Law and religion

function.zh: 军队管理
function.en: Army administration

localAdmin.zh: 地方由王室任命的省长与部族酋长管理。
localAdmin.en: Localities administered by royally appointed governors and tribal chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 牲畜税、贸易税、贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Livestock taxes, trade taxes, tribute.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 博尔努以千年伊斯兰学术传统和跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽地位著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Bornu was known for its millennial Islamic scholarly tradition and trans-Saharan trade hub status.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（卡努里语）
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan (Kanuri)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术与萨赫勒王权传统结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarship combined with Sahelian kingship tradition.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字

enemies.zh: 与邻国有周期性冲突。
enemies.en: Periodic conflicts with neighbors.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护帝国领土和贸易通道。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained imperial territory and trade routes.

era.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰帝国

keyInnovations.en: Islamic school networks, trans-Saharan trade infrastructure.

strengths.en: Millennial Islamic tradition, trade hub.

weaknesses.zh: 王权衰落、内部权力斗争。
weaknesses.en: Declining royal power, internal struggles.

outlook.en: Though declining, Bornu remained an important Sahelian state.

description.en: In 1750 the Bornu Empire was a Sahelian Islamic power in the declining Sayfawa era.

socialStructure.en: Matrilineal clan system; chiefs, goldsmiths, merchants, farmers, and slaves.

rulingClass.en: Asantehene and Oyoko royals

succession.zh: 由王母与主要酋长从王族中选出。
succession.en: Selected from the royal clan by queen mothers and principal chiefs.

philosophy.en: National sacrality centered on the Golden Stool.

outlook.en: At its golden age.

allies.en: Nominally loyal to Ottomans.

keyInnovations.en: Mediterranean navigation and fortress architecture.

strengths.en: Strategic Mediterranean position, corsair tradition.

weaknesses.zh: 经济依赖海盗、欧洲海军威胁。
weaknesses.en: Economy dependent on corsairing, European naval threat.

outlook.en: Karamanli dynasty maintained rule.

description.zh: 1750年的的黎波里塔尼亚是卡拉曼利王朝统治下的北非海盗国家。
description.en: In 1750 Tripolitania was a North African corsair state under the Karamanli dynasty.

governmentForm.en: Omani imperial colonial territory and trade outpost in East Africa.

socialStructure.en: Arab rulers, Indian merchants, Swahili residents, African slaves.

rulingClass.en: Omani Busaid dynasty agents

succession.zh: 代理人由阿曼中央任命。
succession.en: Agents appointed by Omani central authority.

structure.zh: 阿曼派遣的总督管理贸易与防务。
structure.en: Omani-dispatched governors managed trade and defense.

function.zh: 贸易与行政
function.en: Trade and administration

function.zh: 关税征收
function.en: Customs collection

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城镇由阿曼代理人管理。
localAdmin.en: Coastal towns administered by Omani agents.

legalSystem.zh: 伊巴德派伊斯兰法。

philosophy.en: Islamic commercial ethics.

householdWealth.en: Arab and Indian merchants wealthy.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 印度洋商业贸易经济。
economicSystem.en: Indian Ocean commercial trade economy.

treasuryDescription.en: Trade income flowed steadily.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 贸易税收为核心。
fiscalPolicy.en: Trade tax revenue was central.

description.zh: 帆船与沿海驻军。
description.en: Sailing vessels and coastal garrisons.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督
commanderInChief.en: Governor

technology.zh: 帆船与火器。
technology.en: Sailing vessels and firearms.

threats.zh: 葡萄牙残余和内陆部族。
threats.en: Portuguese remnants and inland peoples.

populationDescription.zh: 桑给巴尔及沿海属地约30万。
populationDescription.en: Zanzibar and coastal possessions about 300,000.

socialClasses.zh: 阿拉伯精英、印度商人、斯瓦希里居民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Arab elite, Indian merchants, Swahili residents, slaves

allies.zh: 阿曼本土。
allies.en: Omani homeland.

enemies.zh: 葡萄牙残余势力。
enemies.en: Portuguese remnant forces.

foreignPolicy.zh: 扩大东非贸易控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Expanded East African trade control.

era.zh: 印度洋贸易帝国

keyInnovations.zh: 远洋航海、贸易网络。
keyInnovations.en: Ocean-going navigation, trade networks.

strengths.zh: 印度洋贸易控制、阿曼支持。
strengths.en: Indian Ocean trade control, Omani support.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少、军力有限。
weaknesses.en: Small population, limited military.

outlook.zh: 阿曼桑给巴尔正在扩张贸易影响力。
outlook.en: Omani Zanzibar was expanding trade influence.

description.zh: 1750年的阿曼桑给巴尔是布赛义德王朝在东非的贸易前哨，正在扩大影响力。
description.en: In 1750 Omani Zanzibar was a Busaid dynasty trade outpost in East Africa, expanding its influence.

name.zh: 毛利人（奥特亚罗瓦/新西兰）

ruler.zh: 各部落联盟阿里基（最高酋长）

dynasty.zh: 各伊维独立的酋长世系
dynasty.en: Independent chiefly lineages within each iwi

capital.zh: 无统一首都（各伊维有各自的主要帕堡垒）
capital.en: No unified capital (each iwi had its own main pā fortification)

governmentForm.zh: 以世袭酋长制为核心的部落联盟社会，各伊维和哈普由阿里基和朗加蒂拉统治。帕堡垒战争体系高度成熟。
governmentForm.en: A tribal confederation society centered on hereditary chieftainship, with iwi and hapū ruled by ariki and rangatira. The pā warfare system was highly mature.

socialStructure.zh: 社会分为阿里基、朗加蒂拉、图图阿和塔乌雷卡雷卡四个等级。此时期社会组织更加复杂，大型伊维的阿里基权威显著增强。
socialStructure.en: Society was divided into ariki, rangatira, tutua, and taurēkareka. Social organization was more complex in this period, with the authority of large iwi ariki significantly strengthened.

rulingClass.zh: 世袭酋长阶层，马纳和战功为权威基础。大型伊维控制了广阔领地和大量人口。
rulingClass.en: Hereditary chiefly class, with mana and martial accomplishment as the basis of authority. Large iwi controlled extensive territories and substantial populations.

succession.zh: 以长子世袭为主，军事能力和马纳影响继承。
succession.en: Primarily primogeniture, with military ability and mana influencing succession.

structure.zh: 各伊维独立治理，阿里基通过马纳和塔布权威管理社区。帕堡垒体系达到建筑和防御的顶峰，部分伊维控制了数千人口的大型领地。
structure.en: Each iwi governed independently, with ariki managing communities through mana and tapu authority. The pā fortification system reached its architectural and defensive peak, with some iwi controlling large territories of thousands.

function.zh: 负责宗教仪式、医疗、航海、建筑、纹身和历法。
function.en: Responsible for religious ceremonies, medicine, navigation, construction, tattooing, and calendrics.

function.zh: 在惠上讨论战略，协调大规模帕堡垒攻防战。
function.en: Discussed strategy at hui and coordinated large-scale pā siege warfare.

localAdmin.zh: 哈普层面由朗加蒂拉管理日常事务。
localAdmin.en: At the hapū level, rangatira managed daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 以蒂卡纳（习俗法）为核心，乌图原则和塔布制度高度成熟。
legalSystem.en: Centered on tikanga (customary law), with the utu principle and tapu system highly mature.

taxationSystem.zh: 以贡品和劳役为主，大型伊维的征收能力显著增强。
taxationSystem.en: Based on tribute and labor; collection capacity of large iwi was significantly enhanced.

religion.zh: 波利尼西亚多神教（毛利传统信仰）
religion.en: Polynesian polytheism (Māori traditional beliefs)

culturalAchievements.zh: 帕堡垒建筑达到巅峰，采用多层壕沟、木栅、射击平台和地下食物储藏坑的复杂防御体系。塔莫科面部纹身、哈卡战舞、瓦卡独木舟和木雕技艺均达到古典时期最高水平。库马拉农业体系高度完善。
culturalAchievements.en: Pā fortification architecture reached its peak, employing complex defense systems with multi-layered ditches, palisades, fighting platforms, and underground food storage pits. Tā moko facial tattooing, haka war dance, waka canoe, and wood carving all reached the highest level of the classical period. Kūmara agricultural systems were highly refined.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系，波利尼西亚语支（毛利语）
languageFamily.en: Austronesian, Polynesian branch (Te reo Māori)

philosophy.zh: 万加努伊坦加、马纳、塔布和乌图原则高度成熟，凯蒂亚基坦加（自然守护）概念深入人心。
philosophy.en: Whanaungatanga, mana, tapu, and utu principles were highly mature; the kaitiakitanga (environmental guardianship) concept was deeply embedded.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，口述传统和谱系记忆极为发达。
writingSystem.en: No writing system; oral tradition and genealogical memory were extremely well developed.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以库马拉栽培、渔业、蕨根采集和猎鸟为基础。翡翠加工和贸易是重要的高价值经济活动。帕堡垒附近的农业系统高度精耕细作。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on kūmara cultivation, fishing, fernroot gathering, and bird-hunting. Pounamu (greenstone) working and trade were important high-value economic activities. Agricultural systems near pā were intensively cultivated.

mainIndustries.zh: 库马拉栽培、渔业、翡翠加工、木雕、独木舟建造、亚麻编织
mainIndustries.en: Kūmara cultivation, fishing, pounamu working, wood carving, canoe building, flax weaving

tradeGoods.zh: 翡翠、黑曜石、渔产、亚麻织品、木雕制品
tradeGoods.en: Pounamu, obsidian, fish products, flax textiles, wood carvings

householdWealth.zh: 以翡翠制品、武器、独木舟和食物储存衡量。
householdWealth.en: Measured by pounamu artifacts, weapons, canoes, and food stores.

economicSystem.zh: 以酋长再分配和哈普集体生产为核心的部落园圃-渔猎经济。
economicSystem.en: A tribal horticultural-fishing-hunting economy centered on chiefly redistribution and hapū collective production.

treasuryDescription.zh: 酋长储备以翡翠制品、武器和食物储存为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Chiefly reserves mainly consisted of pounamu artifacts, weapons, and food stores.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过贡赋再分配巩固酋长权威，支持帕堡垒建设和战争。
fiscalPolicy.en: Reinforced chiefly authority through tributary redistribution, supporting pā construction and warfare.

description.zh: 各哈普成年男性战士，精通泰哈和梅雷武术，善于帕堡垒攻防战。
description.en: Adult male warriors from each hapū, proficient with taiaha and mere, skilled in pā siege warfare.

description.zh: 利用大型战争独木舟进行沿海和河流作战。
description.en: Used large war canoes for coastal and riverine combat.

commanderInChief.zh: 各伊维的阿里基或战争领袖分别指挥
commanderInChief.en: Each iwi's ariki or war leader commanded independently

technology.zh: 泰哈、梅雷、翡翠棍、多层帕堡垒防御工事（壕沟、木栅、射击平台）、瓦卡战争独木舟。帕堡垒防御体系为世界上同时代最复杂的土木工事之一。
technology.en: Taiaha, mere, pounamu clubs, multi-layered pā fortifications (ditches, palisades, fighting platforms), waka war canoes. The pā defense system was among the most complex earthworks of its era worldwide.

threats.zh: 部落间的帕堡垒战争持续不断。詹姆斯·库克船长即将于1769年到达，欧洲接触将根本改变军事平衡。
threats.en: Inter-tribal pā warfare was continuous. Captain James Cook would arrive in 1769, and European contact would fundamentally alter the military balance.

populationDescription.zh: 约11万毛利人分布于新西兰两岛，人口缓慢增长。北岛怀卡托、丰盛湾和北部地区人口最为集中。
populationDescription.en: About 110,000 Māori distributed across both islands of New Zealand, with slow population growth. The Waikato, Bay of Plenty, and Northland regions of the North Island were the most densely populated.

socialClasses.zh: 阿里基、朗加蒂拉、图图阿、塔乌雷卡雷卡
socialClasses.en: Ariki, rangatira, tutua, taurēkareka

allies.zh: 伊维间通过联姻和翡翠贸易维持关系。
allies.en: Iwi maintained relations through intermarriage and pounamu trade.

enemies.zh: 部落间帕堡垒战争频繁。
enemies.en: Inter-tribal pā warfare was frequent.

foreignPolicy.zh: 各伊维独立处理对外关系。与欧洲人的大规模接触尚未开始。
foreignPolicy.en: Each iwi handled external relations independently. Large-scale contact with Europeans had not yet begun.

era.zh: 毛利古典时期晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 多层帕堡垒防御工事（全球同时代最复杂）、翡翠精加工、大型瓦卡战争独木舟、库马拉密集栽培与储存技术
keyInnovations.en: Multi-layered pā fortifications (the most complex of their era globally), refined pounamu working, large waka war canoes, intensive kūmara cultivation and storage technology

strengths.zh: 帕堡垒防御体系世界一流，战士传统深厚，翡翠加工和木雕艺术精湛，社会组织成熟。
strengths.en: World-class pā fortification systems, deep warrior tradition, exquisite pounamu and wood-carving art, and mature social organization.

weaknesses.zh: 政治分散，无文字和金属冶炼，部落战争消耗持续。即将面对欧洲技术优势。
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation, no writing or metal smelting, continuous resource drain from tribal warfare. About to face European technological superiority.

outlook.zh: 毛利古典文化即将迎来最大挑战：1769年库克到达后，欧洲殖民力量将深刻改变新西兰的政治、军事和文化格局。
outlook.en: Classical Māori culture was about to face its greatest challenge: after Cook's arrival in 1769, European colonial forces would profoundly transform New Zealand's political, military, and cultural landscape.

description.zh: 1750年的毛利人正处于古典时期晚期，帕堡垒战争体系达到巅峰，社会组织高度成熟。但即将到来的欧洲大规模接触将彻底改变毛利社会。
description.en: In 1750, the Māori were in the late classical period, with the pā warfare system at its peak and highly mature social organization. However, imminent large-scale European contact would fundamentally transform Māori society.

ruler.zh: 图伊·卡诺库波卢王系（实际统治者），图伊·汤加保留仪式权威
ruler.en: Tu'i Kanokupolu line (de facto rulers), with Tu'i Tonga retaining ceremonial authority

rulerTitle.zh: 图伊·卡诺库波卢（世俗权力）/ 图伊·汤加（仪式权威）
rulerTitle.en: Tu'i Kanokupolu (secular power) / Tu'i Tonga (ceremonial authority)

dynasty.zh: 卡诺库波卢王系（实权）与汤加王系（礼仪）并存
dynasty.en: Kanokupolu line (actual power) coexisting with the Tonga line (ceremonial)

capital.zh: 穆阿（仪式中心）/ 努库阿洛法（行政中心）

governmentForm.zh: 双轨制海洋王国：图伊·汤加保持神圣礼仪权威，实际政治和军事权力已转移至图伊·卡诺库波卢王系。
governmentForm.en: A dual-track maritime kingdom: the Tu'i Tonga retained sacred ceremonial authority, while actual political and military power had shifted to the Tu'i Kanokupolu line.

socialStructure.zh: 社会高度分层，双重王系（汤加与卡诺库波卢）居于顶层，其下为高级酋长、地方酋长、自由民和从属劳作者。
socialStructure.en: Society was highly stratified, with the dual royal lines (Tonga and Kanokupolu) at the top, followed by high chiefs, local chiefs, commoners, and subordinate laborers.

rulingClass.zh: 双重王室和高级酋长构成统治阶层，卡诺库波卢王系控制实际权力。
rulingClass.en: The dual royal houses and high chiefs formed the ruling class, with the Kanokupolu line controlling actual power.

succession.zh: 图伊·汤加仪式性继承，图伊·卡诺库波卢的继承涉及更多政治竞争。
succession.en: Tu'i Tonga succession was ceremonial; Tu'i Kanokupolu succession involved more political competition.

structure.zh: 图伊·卡诺库波卢掌控日常政务和军事，图伊·汤加主持重大仪式和宗教事务。各岛酋长向双重权威效忠。
structure.en: The Tu'i Kanokupolu controlled daily governance and military affairs, while the Tu'i Tonga presided over major ceremonies and religious matters. Island chiefs owed allegiance to the dual authority.

function.zh: 主持图伊·汤加的仪式和祭祀活动。
function.en: Managed the Tu'i Tonga's ceremonial and worship activities.

function.zh: 征集贡品、管理劳役和协调行政事务，隶属图伊·卡诺库波卢。
function.en: Collected tribute, managed labor service, and coordinated administration under the Tu'i Kanokupolu.

localAdmin.zh: 岛屿酋长在地方层面实行管理，向卡诺库波卢中心输送贡品和劳力。
localAdmin.en: Island chiefs administered at the local level, providing tribute and labor to the Kanokupolu center.

legalSystem.zh: 以塔布制度和酋长裁决为核心的习惯法，双重王系的存在使法律体系更为复杂。
legalSystem.en: Customary law centered on the tapu system and chiefly adjudication, made more complex by the dual royal system.

taxationSystem.zh: 以贡品和劳役为主，卡诺库波卢系统化了征收体系。
taxationSystem.en: Based on tribute and labor; the Kanokupolu systematized the collection system.

religion.zh: 波利尼西亚多神教
religion.en: Polynesian polytheism

culturalAchievements.zh: 巨石墓丘（兰吉）建筑传统延续，航海技术保持但远洋探索减少。树皮布和席编织技艺精湛，作为礼仪交换的核心物品。
culturalAchievements.en: Monumental tomb-mound (langi) architectural tradition continued; navigation skills were maintained though long-distance exploration declined. Barkcloth and mat weaving were exquisite, serving as core items of ceremonial exchange.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系，波利尼西亚语支
languageFamily.en: Austronesian, Polynesian branch

philosophy.zh: 波利尼西亚多神信仰和图伊·汤加的神圣王权传统延续，但世俗权力转移给卡诺库波卢反映了实用主义的政治演变。
philosophy.en: Polynesian polytheistic beliefs and the Tu'i Tonga's sacred kingship tradition continued, but the transfer of secular power to the Kanokupolu reflected pragmatic political evolution.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，口述传统保存历史。
writingSystem.en: No writing system; oral tradition preserved history.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以园圃农业（芋头、山药、面包果、椰子）和渔业为基础，猪鸡饲养和树皮布生产为重要补充。与欧洲探险者的接触尚未对经济产生实质影响。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on horticulture (taro, yams, breadfruit, coconuts) and fishing, with pig and chicken husbandry and barkcloth production as important supplements. Contact with European explorers had not yet substantially affected the economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 芋头与山药种植、渔业、树皮布与席编织、独木舟建造
mainIndustries.en: Taro and yam cultivation, fishing, barkcloth and mat weaving, canoe building

tradeGoods.zh: 细席、树皮布、贝壳、渔产、椰子制品
tradeGoods.en: Fine mats, barkcloth, shells, fish products, coconut goods

householdWealth.zh: 以园地、船只、席布储备和酋长关系衡量。
householdWealth.en: Measured by garden plots, boats, mat and cloth reserves, and chiefly connections.

economicSystem.zh: 以卡诺库波卢王系主导的再分配和村社生产为核心的海洋园圃经济。
economicSystem.en: A maritime horticultural economy centered on Kanokupolu-led redistribution and village production.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财富分散于双重王系和高级酋长手中，以细席、树皮布和食物储备为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Wealth was dispersed between the dual royal lines and high chiefs, mainly in fine mats, barkcloth, and food reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 卡诺库波卢系统化了贡赋征收，但图伊·汤加仪式仍需大量资源支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: The Kanokupolu systematized tribute collection, but Tu'i Tonga ceremonies still required substantial resource support.

description.zh: 图伊·卡诺库波卢直属的近卫战士，是核心军事力量。
description.en: Guard warriors under the direct command of the Tu'i Kanokupolu, serving as the core military force.

description.zh: 各岛酋长按需征发，用于防御和远征。
description.en: Levied by island chiefs as needed for defense and expeditions.

description.zh: 以航海独木舟执行海上巡逻和投送任务。
description.en: Used oceangoing canoes for maritime patrol and projection.

commanderInChief.zh: 图伊·卡诺库波卢
commanderInChief.en: Tu'i Kanokupolu

technology.zh: 木矛、棍棒、石制武器、纤维甲、远航独木舟。与塔斯曼（1643年）和后来的欧洲探险者接触后，对火器有所了解但尚未普及。
technology.en: Wooden spears, clubs, stone weapons, fiber armor, oceangoing canoes. After contact with Tasman (1643) and later European explorers, awareness of firearms existed but they were not yet widespread.

threats.zh: 内部双重王系的政治紧张和权力竞争是最大威胁。欧洲势力的渗透尚处早期阶段。
threats.en: Internal political tensions and power competition between the dual royal lines were the greatest threats. European penetration was still in its early stages.

populationDescription.zh: 约4万人分布于汤加群岛各岛，汤加塔布岛人口最为集中。
populationDescription.en: About 40,000 people distributed across the Tongan archipelago, with the highest concentration on Tongatapu island.

socialClasses.zh: 双重王室、高级酋长、地方酋长、自由民、从属劳作者
socialClasses.en: Dual royal houses, high chiefs, local chiefs, commoners, subordinate laborers

allies.zh: 与萨摩亚和斐济保持传统联系和贸易关系。
allies.en: Maintained traditional ties and trade relations with Samoa and Fiji.

enemies.zh: 内部双重王系竞争是主要政治紧张来源。与部分萨摩亚酋邦存在传统对抗。
enemies.en: Internal dual-line competition was the main source of political tension. Traditional rivalries existed with some Samoan chiefdoms.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持与太平洋岛群的传统海洋联系，与欧洲探险者保持谨慎接触。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained traditional maritime connections with Pacific island groups and cautious contact with European explorers.

era.zh: 波利尼西亚古典晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 巨石兰吉墓丘建筑、远洋航海独木舟、树皮布与席编织、园圃农业
keyInnovations.en: Monumental langi tomb-mound architecture, oceangoing canoes, barkcloth and mat weaving, horticultural agriculture

strengths.zh: 太平洋最古老的王权传统之一，社会组织较为成熟，海洋联系广泛。
strengths.en: One of the oldest royal traditions in the Pacific, with relatively mature social organization and extensive maritime connections.

weaknesses.zh: 双重权力体系造成内部紧张，人口和资源基础有限，缺乏金属和文字。
weaknesses.en: Dual power system created internal tensions; limited population and resource base; lacking metals and writing.

outlook.zh: 图伊·汤加的仪式权威正在衰退，实际权力完全转向卡诺库波卢王系。19世纪欧洲传教士和殖民者的到来将推动汤加走向基督教化和现代国家建设。
outlook.en: The Tu'i Tonga's ceremonial authority was declining, with actual power fully shifting to the Kanokupolu line. The arrival of European missionaries and colonists in the 19th century would drive Tonga toward Christianization and modern state-building.

description.zh: 1750年的汤加王国处于双重权力过渡期，图伊·汤加仅保留仪式权威，实际政治权力已完全转移至图伊·卡诺库波卢王系。
description.en: In 1750, the Tongan kingdom was in a dual-power transition, with the Tu'i Tonga retaining only ceremonial authority while actual political power had fully shifted to the Tu'i Kanokupolu line.

governmentForm.zh: 游猎营地，深度嵌入毛皮贸易。
governmentForm.en: Mobile camps, deeply embedded in fur trade.

socialStructure.zh: 毛皮贸易改变传统等级。
socialStructure.en: Fur trade reshaping traditional hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 传统与毛皮贸易文化混合。
culturalAchievements.en: Blend of traditional and fur trade culture.

languageFamily.zh: 阿萨巴斯卡/阿尔冈昆/克里
languageFamily.en: Athabaskan/Algonquian/Cree

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 毛皮贸易成为主要经济活动。
gdpDescription.en: Fur trade became primary economic activity.

mainIndustries.zh: 毛皮贸易、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Fur trade, hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 海狸皮、毛皮
tradeGoods.en: Beaver pelts, furs

householdWealth.zh: 毛皮和贸易品。
householdWealth.en: Furs and trade goods.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 疫病、酒精、贸易依赖。
threats.en: Disease, alcohol, trade dependence.

populationDescription.zh: 加拿大亚寒带。
populationDescription.en: Canadian subarctic.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 火器、铁器普及。
keyInnovations.en: Widespread firearms and iron tools.

strengths.zh: 毛皮贸易中间人角色。
strengths.en: Middleman role in fur trade.

weaknesses.zh: 人口减少，依赖欧洲。
weaknesses.en: Population declining, European dependent.

outlook.zh: 将被殖民进一步边缘化。
outlook.en: Would be further marginalized by colonization.

description.zh: 1750年亚北极猎人，深度参与毛皮贸易。
description.en: Subarctic hunters in 1750, deeply engaged in fur trade.

name.zh: 北美太平洋沿岸采集者
北美太平洋沿岸采集者

governmentForm.zh: 世袭首领社会。
governmentForm.en: Hereditary leader societies.

socialStructure.zh: 等级社会延续。
socialStructure.en: Stratified society continued.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 图腾柱和夸富宴鼎盛。
culturalAchievements.en: Totem poles and potlatch at height.

languageFamily.zh: 萨利希/瓦卡什/特林吉特
languageFamily.en: Salishan/Wakashan/Tlingit

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 鲑鱼和海洋资源。
gdpDescription.en: Salmon and marine resources.

mainIndustries.zh: 鲑鱼、木工
mainIndustries.en: Salmon, woodworking

tradeGoods.zh: 鲑鱼干、海獭皮
tradeGoods.en: Dried salmon, sea otter pelts

householdWealth.zh: 独木舟和铜器。
householdWealth.en: Canoes and coppers.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 俄罗斯和西班牙探险家接近。
threats.en: Russian and Spanish explorers approaching.

populationDescription.zh: 太平洋西北。
populationDescription.en: Pacific Northwest.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 木工鼎盛。
keyInnovations.en: Peak woodworking.

strengths.zh: 资源极丰。
strengths.en: Extremely rich resources.

weaknesses.zh: 欧洲接触即将到来。
weaknesses.en: European contact imminent.

outlook.zh: 海獭贸易将很快改变一切。
outlook.en: Sea otter trade would soon change everything.

description.zh: 1750年太平洋西北采集社会，接触前最后的繁荣期。
description.en: Pacific Northwest foraging societies in 1750, last period of pre-contact flourishing.

governmentForm.zh: 渔猎村社，马匹已普及。
governmentForm.en: Fishing villages, horses widespread.

socialStructure.zh: 马匹增加了社会流动性。
socialStructure.en: Horses increased social mobility.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 马背和鲑鱼文化融合。
culturalAchievements.en: Blend of horse and salmon culture.

languageFamily.zh: 萨利希/内兹佩尔塞
languageFamily.en: Salishan/Nez Perce

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

gdpDescription.zh: 鲑鱼和马匹贸易。
gdpDescription.en: Salmon and horse trade.

mainIndustries.en: Fishing, horse raising

tradeGoods.zh: 鲑鱼干、马匹
tradeGoods.en: Dried salmon, horses

governmentForm.zh: 耶稣会传教区和独立村社。
governmentForm.en: Jesuit missions and independent villages.

socialStructure.zh: 传教区和传统社会并存。
socialStructure.en: Mission and traditional societies coexisted.

rulingClass.zh: 部族首领与长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 耶稣会传教区混合文化鼎盛。
culturalAchievements.en: Jesuit mission hybrid culture at height.

languageFamily.zh: 瓜拉尼
languageFamily.en: Guaraní

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

weaknesses.zh: 人口持续减少。

outlook.zh: 耶稣会驱逐将打击社区。
outlook.en: Jesuit expulsion would devastate communities.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 大平原最强大的马背战士文化。
culturalAchievements.en: The most powerful horse warrior culture of the Great Plains.

languageFamily.zh: 科曼奇语（犹他-阿兹特克语系）
languageFamily.en: Comanche (Uto-Aztecan family)

philosophy.zh: 战士荣誉和马匹崇拜。
philosophy.en: Warrior honor and horse culture.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 以马匹贸易、野牛狩猎和突袭掠夺为经济基础。
gdpDescription.en: Economy based on horse trade, bison hunting, and raiding.

mainIndustries.zh: 马匹饲养与贸易、野牛狩猎、突袭
mainIndustries.en: Horse raising and trade, bison hunting, raiding

tradeGoods.zh: 马匹、野牛皮、俘虏
tradeGoods.en: Horses, bison hides, captives

householdWealth.zh: 庞大的马群。
householdWealth.en: Vast horse herds.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 精锐马背战士突袭队。
description.en: Elite mounted raiding warrior bands.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 西班牙和其他部族。
threats.en: Spain and other tribes.

populationDescription.zh: 南部大平原（科曼切里亚）。
populationDescription.en: Southern Great Plains (Comanchería).

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 精湛骑术和火器运用。
keyInnovations.en: Superb horsemanship and firearm use.

strengths.zh: 军事力量强大，马匹资源无与伦比。
strengths.en: Powerful military, unmatched horse resources.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，依赖突袭经济。
weaknesses.en: Small population, dependent on raiding economy.

outlook.zh: 将在19世纪中叶达到鼎盛后迅速衰落。
outlook.en: Would peak in mid-19th century then rapidly decline.

description.zh: 1750年科曼奇帝国，南部大平原的马背霸主。
description.en: The Comanche Empire in 1750, horse lords of the southern Great Plains.

name.zh: 克里克联盟（马斯科吉联盟）

governmentForm.zh: 以镇为基础的松散联盟，大议事会协调。
governmentForm.en: Loose confederacy of towns, coordinated by a Grand Council.

socialStructure.zh: 母系氏族社会，红镇（战争镇）和白镇（和平镇）并存。
socialStructure.en: Matrilineal clan society with Red (war) and White (peace) towns.

rulingClass.zh: 米科首领和氏族长老
rulingClass.en: Mico chiefs and clan elders

succession.zh: 继承主要依亲属血统与长老推举，个人威望与军事才能亦起作用。
succession.en: Succession depended on kinship, elder selection, and personal prestige or martial ability.

structure.zh: 松散的酋邦或部族联合体，由首领与长老协商决策。
structure.en: A loose chiefdom or tribal confederation in which chiefs and elders made decisions by consultation.

function.zh: 协调部族事务、纠纷调解与仪式安排。
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs, settled disputes, and organized rituals.

function.zh: 管理食物储备、劳役调配与对外交换物资。
function.en: Managed food stores, labor allocation, and goods for external exchange.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理由家族长者与营地首领执行，各聚落在日常事务上享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was carried out by family elders and camp leaders, with settlements enjoying broad autonomy in daily affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以习惯规范、长老裁决与公开调解为基础。
legalSystem.en: Law was based on customary norms, elder adjudication, and public mediation.

taxationSystem.zh: 无正式税制，资源通过贡礼、集体劳役和仪式再分配集中。
taxationSystem.en: There was no formal tax system; resources were concentrated through tribute, collective labor, and ritual redistribution.

religion.zh: 万物有灵信仰
religion.en: Animism

culturalAchievements.zh: 绿玉米节和丰富的口述传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Green Corn Ceremony and rich oral traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 马斯科吉语系
languageFamily.en: Muskogean language family

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵与祖灵崇敬构成核心世界观，强调与自然的和谐共存。
philosophy.en: Animism and ancestor reverence formed the core worldview, emphasizing harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 无成熟文字，知识通过口述传统、歌谣与仪式传承。
writingSystem.en: No developed writing system; knowledge was transmitted through oral tradition, songs, and ritual.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year

gdpDescription.zh: 玉米农业和鹿皮贸易。
gdpDescription.en: Maize agriculture and deerskin trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、鹿皮贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, deerskin trade

tradeGoods.zh: 鹿皮、玉米
tradeGoods.en: Deerskins, maize

householdWealth.zh: 耕地和贸易品。
householdWealth.en: Farmland and trade goods.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person-year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以家庭自给生产和部族内部再分配为主的经济体系。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on household subsistence production and intra-tribal redistribution.

grams of silver equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: "国库"主要为首领控制的食物与工具储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The "treasury" consisted mainly of chiefly controlled stores of food and tools.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持储备和仪式再分配为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal practice aimed to maintain reserves and support ritual redistribution.

description.zh: 由青壮年组成，使用石器、木矛和弓箭进行防御与突袭。
description.en: Composed of able-bodied men using stone tools, wooden spears, and bows for defense and raids.

technology.zh: 以石器、木骨武器和弓箭为主，无金属冶炼。
technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 英国殖民扩张。
threats.en: British colonial expansion.

populationDescription.zh: 美国东南部。
populationDescription.en: Southeastern United States.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 火器和欧洲农具。
keyInnovations.en: Firearms and European farm tools.

strengths.zh: 灵活的联盟外交。
strengths.en: Flexible alliance diplomacy.

weaknesses.zh: 松散组织，面临殖民压力。
weaknesses.en: Loose organization, colonial pressure.

outlook.zh: 将在19世纪初面临强制迁移。
outlook.en: Would face forced removal in early 19th century.

description.zh: 1750年克里克联盟，美国东南部强大的原住民联盟。
description.en: The Creek Confederacy in 1750, a powerful indigenous confederacy of the southeastern US.

governmentForm.zh: 曾经强大的班图王国残余政权，中央权力严重衰退，各省实际独立
governmentForm.en: A remnant of a once-powerful Bantu kingdom, with central authority severely declined and provinces effectively independent

socialStructure.zh: 社会因内战和奴隶贸易而严重碎片化。王族、天主教精英、地方军阀、商人、农民和大量被掠夺人口构成分裂的社会。
socialStructure.en: Society was severely fragmented by civil wars and the slave trade. Royalty, Catholic elites, local warlords, merchants, farmers, and large numbers of displaced people formed a divided society.

rulingClass.zh: 分裂的王族派系、各省自立的贵族军阀
rulingClass.en: Fractured royal factions and self-governing provincial noble-warlords

succession.zh: 王位在竞争的王族派系间激烈争夺，往往通过战争和外部支持决定。
succession.en: The throne was fiercely contested among competing royal factions, often determined through warfare and external support.

structure.zh: 中央朝廷在圣萨尔瓦多名义上存在，但实际控制范围极为有限。各省首领已成为事实上的独立统治者。
structure.en: The central court nominally existed at São Salvador, but its actual control was extremely limited. Provincial chiefs had become de facto independent rulers.

function.zh: 残存的中央决策机构。
function.en: A surviving but weakened central decision body.

function.zh: 宗教事务和部分行政功能。
function.en: Religious affairs and some administrative functions.

localAdmin.zh: 各省由自立的贵族统治，仅名义上承认曼尼刚果。
localAdmin.en: Provinces were ruled by self-governing nobles who only nominally recognized the Manikongo.

legalSystem.zh: 刚果习惯法与天主教教会法并行，但法律执行力极弱。
legalSystem.en: Kongo customary law and Catholic canon law coexisted, but legal enforcement was extremely weak.

taxationSystem.zh: 中央几乎无法征税，收入主要来自圣萨尔瓦多周边直接控制区的贡赋。
taxationSystem.en: The center could barely collect taxes, with revenue mainly from tribute in areas directly controlled around São Salvador.

religion.zh: 天主教（自15世纪末传入，已深入融合本地传统）
religion.en: Roman Catholicism (introduced from the late 15th century, deeply syncretized with local traditions)

culturalAchievements.zh: 刚果天主教文化是撒哈拉以南非洲最早的基督教化成果之一，产生了独特的宗教艺术和建筑。
culturalAchievements.en: Kongo Catholic culture was one of the earliest Christianization achievements in sub-Saharan Africa, producing distinctive religious art and architecture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（基刚果语）
languageFamily.en: Bantu branch of Niger-Congo (Kikongo)

philosophy.zh: 天主教与班图传统信仰的深度融合，形成独特的刚果基督教世界观。
philosophy.en: A deep syncretism of Catholicism and Bantu traditional beliefs, forming a distinctive Kongo Christian worldview.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（葡萄牙语为官方文书语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Portuguese as official documentary language)

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济因长期内战和奴隶贸易而严重衰退。残存的农业和地方贸易维持基本生存。
gdpDescription.en: The economy had severely declined due to prolonged civil wars and the slave trade. Surviving agriculture and local trade maintained basic subsistence.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、残存的拉菲亚纺织、地方贸易
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, surviving raffia weaving, local trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶（被迫出口）、少量象牙和拉菲亚布
tradeGoods.en: Slaves (forced export), small quantities of ivory and raffia cloth

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭仅维持基本生存水平。
householdWealth.en: Most households maintained only basic subsistence levels.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 碎片化的贡赋经济，大西洋奴隶贸易深刻扭曲了经济结构。
economicSystem.en: A fragmented tribute economy, profoundly distorted by the Atlantic slave trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库几乎枯竭。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was nearly empty.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 仅求维持基本生存。
fiscalPolicy.en: Merely trying to survive.

description.zh: 曼尼刚果残存的直属武力。
description.en: The Manikongo's surviving personal force.

description.zh: 各地方首领的武装力量，忠诚不可靠。
description.en: Armed forces of local chiefs, with unreliable loyalty.

commanderInChief.zh: 曼尼刚果名义统帅
commanderInChief.en: The Manikongo as nominal commander

technology.zh: 使用部分欧洲火器与传统武器混合。
technology.en: Used a mix of some European firearms and traditional weapons.

threats.zh: 葡萄牙殖民扩张、内部派系战争、奴隶猎人。
threats.en: Portuguese colonial expansion, internal factional wars, and slave raiders.

populationDescription.zh: 人口因内战和奴隶贸易而大幅减少。
populationDescription.en: Population drastically reduced by civil wars and the slave trade.

socialClasses.zh: 社会严重碎片化，传统等级制在内战中瓦解。
socialClasses.en: Society was severely fragmented, with traditional hierarchies dissolving in civil war.

allies.zh: 各派系分别寻求葡萄牙支持
allies.en: Various factions separately sought Portuguese support

enemies.zh: 内部敌对派系、葡萄牙殖民势力、奴隶贸易者
enemies.en: Internal rival factions, Portuguese colonial forces, and slave traders

foreignPolicy.zh: 在生存中求平衡，各派系争相利用外部势力。
foreignPolicy.en: Balancing for survival, with factions competing to exploit external powers.

era.zh: 近代非洲殖民接触期

keyInnovations.zh: 部分欧洲火器引入、天主教文书系统残存。
keyInnovations.en: Partial introduction of European firearms and surviving Catholic documentary systems.

strengths.zh: 深厚的天主教文化传统提供文化凝聚力、王室合法性的象征意义犹存。
strengths.en: Deep Catholic cultural tradition providing cultural cohesion, and the symbolic legitimacy of the royal house still enduring.

weaknesses.zh: 中央权力瓦解、经济崩溃、人口流失严重、完全暴露于奴隶贸易破坏中。
weaknesses.en: Central authority collapsed, economy in ruins, severe population loss, and fully exposed to slave trade devastation.

outlook.zh: 刚果王国将继续衰落，最终在19世纪完全失去独立地位。
outlook.en: The Kongo Kingdom would continue declining, ultimately losing independence entirely in the 19th century.

description.zh: 曾经强大的刚果王国残余政权，因内战和奴隶贸易而严重衰落。
description.en: The remnant of the once-powerful Kongo Kingdom, severely declined due to civil wars and the slave trade.

governmentForm.zh: 扩张中的萨赫勒伊斯兰苏丹国，兼具骑兵军事力量和跨撒哈拉贸易国家特征
governmentForm.en: An expanding Sahelian Islamic sultanate, combining cavalry military power with trans-Saharan trading state characteristics

socialStructure.zh: 社会由苏丹王族、马巴族军事贵族、伊斯兰乌里玛、阿拉伯和富拉尼游牧民、定居农民和奴隶构成。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the sultanic family, Maba military nobles, Islamic ulama, Arab and Fulani pastoralists, settled farmers, and slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹家族与马巴族军事精英
rulingClass.en: The sultanic family and Maba military elite

succession.zh: 苏丹位在王族内继承，受宫廷政治影响。
succession.en: The sultanate was inherited within the royal house, influenced by court politics.

structure.zh: 苏丹宫廷设于瓦拉，通过省级总督、部族盟约和伊斯兰法官管理扩大的领土。18世纪瓦达伊正处于扩张高峰。
structure.en: The sultan's court at Wara governed expanded territories through provincial governors, tribal alliances, and Islamic judges. In the 18th century Wadai was at the peak of its expansion.

function.zh: 最高决策与军事指挥中心。
function.en: Supreme decision-making and military command center.

name.zh: 伊斯兰司法与宗教事务署

function.zh: 伊斯兰法审判与宗教教育。
function.en: Islamic law adjudication and religious education.

function.zh: 征收贡赋和管理贸易路线。
function.en: Collecting tribute and managing trade routes.

localAdmin.zh: 省级由总督管理，部族地区通过盟约和贡赋联系，瓦拉周边设直辖区。
localAdmin.en: Provinces were managed by governors, tribal areas linked through alliances and tribute, and a directly administered zone surrounded Wara.

legalSystem.zh: 马立克派伊斯兰法与地方习惯法并行。
legalSystem.en: Maliki Islamic law operated alongside local customary norms.

taxationSystem.zh: 以部族贡赋、跨撒哈拉过境税、奴隶贸易收入和农业征收为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from tribal tribute, trans-Saharan transit taxes, slave trade income, and agricultural levies.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马立克学派）
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school)

culturalAchievements.zh: 瓦拉和阿贝歇成为重要的伊斯兰学术中心，古兰经学校网络发达。
culturalAchievements.en: Wara and Abéché became important Islamic scholarly centers, with developed Qur'anic school networks.

languageFamily.zh: 马巴语和阿拉伯语
languageFamily.en: Maba and Arabic

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰法学与萨赫勒政治传统。
philosophy.en: Islamic jurisprudence and Sahelian political traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济因领土扩张而增长。跨撒哈拉贸易、畜牧业和奴隶贸易是主要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy grew with territorial expansion. Trans-Saharan trade, pastoralism, and the slave trade were main income sources.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、粟米种植、跨撒哈拉贸易、奴隶贸易、皮革加工
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, millet cultivation, trans-Saharan trade, slave trade, leatherwork

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、牲畜、皮革、象牙、鸵鸟羽毛
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, livestock, leather, ivory, ostrich feathers

householdWealth.zh: 游牧家庭以牲畜为资产；定居农民持有耕地和粮仓；商人积累贸易商品。
householdWealth.en: Nomadic households held livestock; settled farmers held arable land and granaries; merchants accumulated trade goods.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋经济与跨撒哈拉贸易结合，奴隶贸易利润日益重要。
economicSystem.en: A tribute economy combined with trans-Saharan trade, with slave trade profits growing in importance.

treasuryDescription.zh: 因扩张而国库充裕。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury was ample due to expansion.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 投资军事扩张和伊斯兰教育。
fiscalPolicy.en: Investing in military expansion and Islamic education.

description.zh: 瓦达伊军事核心。
description.en: The military core of Wadai.

description.zh: 从属地部族征召。
description.en: Levied from subject tribes.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹为最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The sultan as supreme commander

technology.zh: 骑兵战术精湛，装备部分进口火器和传统武器。
technology.en: Skilled cavalry tactics, equipped with some imported firearms and traditional weapons.

threats.zh: 达尔富尔竞争、博尔努压力。
threats.en: Darfur competition and Bornu pressure.

populationDescription.zh: 人口因领土扩张而增长。
populationDescription.en: Population grew with territorial expansion.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹家族与军事贵族居上；商人学者居中；农牧民和奴隶居下。
socialClasses.en: Sultanic family and military nobles at top; merchants and scholars in middle; agro-pastoralists and slaves at bottom.

allies.zh: 与北非奥斯曼属地保持贸易联系
allies.en: Trade ties with Ottoman North Africa

enemies.zh: 达尔富尔苏丹国
enemies.en: Darfur Sultanate

foreignPolicy.zh: 军事扩张与贸易路线控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Military expansion and trade route control.

era.zh: 18世纪萨赫勒

keyInnovations.zh: 骑兵组织、火器引入、伊斯兰教育网络。
keyInnovations.en: Cavalry organization, firearms introduction, Islamic educational networks.

strengths.zh: 强大骑兵、扩张领土、贸易路线控制。
strengths.en: Strong cavalry, expanding territory, trade route control.

weaknesses.zh: 依赖奴隶贸易、达尔富尔竞争。
weaknesses.en: Dependence on slave trade, Darfur competition.

outlook.zh: 瓦达伊将在19世纪继续为萨赫勒主要势力。
outlook.en: Wadai would remain a major Sahelian power into the 19th century.

description.zh: 18世纪扩张高峰中的瓦达伊帝国。
description.en: The Wadai Empire at its 18th-century expansion peak.

ruler.zh: 安德里亚纳姆博伊尼梅里纳

governmentForm.zh: 中央集权化的马达加斯加高地王国，正经历统一进程
governmentForm.en: A centralizing highland Madagascar kingdom, undergoing unification

socialStructure.zh: 社会由安德里亚纳（贵族）、霍瓦（自由民）和安代沃（奴隶/低种姓）三大等级构成。王权正在加强。
socialStructure.en: Society was divided into three main castes: Andriana (nobles), Hova (free commoners), and Andevo (slaves/low caste). Royal power was strengthening.

rulingClass.zh: 梅里纳王族与安德里亚纳贵族
rulingClass.en: Merina royalty and Andriana nobles

succession.zh: 王位在王族内继承，由国王指定继承人并经贵族确认。
succession.en: The throne was inherited within the royal house, with the king designating an heir confirmed by nobles.

structure.zh: 以安塔那那利佛为中心的集权化行政体系。安德里亚纳姆博伊尼梅里纳正推行统一伊梅里纳高原的政策。
structure.en: A centralizing administrative system centered on Antananarivo. Andrianampoinimerina was pursuing policies to unify the Imerina highlands.

function.zh: 最高决策机构。
function.en: Supreme decision-making body.

function.zh: 管理赋税、劳役和地方行政。
function.en: Managed taxes, labor obligations, and local administration.

function.zh: 组织军事力量。
function.en: Organized military forces.

localAdmin.zh: 通过分封贵族和王室代表管理各地。正在推行更集中的行政改革。
localAdmin.en: Governed through enfeoffed nobles and royal representatives. More centralized administrative reforms were being pursued.

legalSystem.zh: 以马达加斯加习惯法和王令为主。法制正在统一化。
legalSystem.en: Based on Malagasy customary law and royal decrees. Legal systems were being unified.

taxationSystem.zh: 以稻米贡赋、劳役（法纳波阿纳制）和市场税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on rice tribute, labor obligations (fanompoana system), and market taxes.

religion.zh: 马达加斯加传统信仰（祖灵崇拜）
religion.en: Malagasy traditional beliefs (ancestral veneration)

culturalAchievements.zh: 以水稻梯田灌溉系统、占卜术（西基迪）、口述历史传统和精美的丝织品闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Renowned for rice-paddy irrigation systems, divination (sikidy), oral historical traditions, and fine silk textiles.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系马达加斯加语
languageFamily.en: Malagasy, Austronesian language family

philosophy.zh: 以祖灵崇拜、命运信仰和社区和谐为核心的世界观。
philosophy.en: A worldview centered on ancestral veneration, fate beliefs, and communal harmony.

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主（阿拉伯字母索拉贝文在部分地区使用）
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition (Sorabe script in Arabic letters used in some areas)

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 以水稻灌溉农业为基础的经济，辅以畜牧业、冶铁和区域贸易。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on irrigated rice agriculture, supplemented by pastoralism, ironworking, and regional trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、畜牧、冶铁、丝织、区域贸易
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, pastoralism, ironworking, silk weaving, regional trade

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、牲畜、铁器、丝织品、奴隶
tradeGoods.en: Rice, livestock, iron goods, silk textiles, slaves

householdWealth.zh: 贵族拥有大量稻田和奴隶；自由民持有耕地和牲畜。
householdWealth.en: Nobles possessed extensive rice paddies and slaves; free commoners held arable land and livestock.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 王室控制劳役与稻米贡赋的集权化农业经济。
economicSystem.en: A centralizing agricultural economy with royal control of labor obligations and rice tribute.

treasuryDescription.zh: 因统一进程的成功而国库趋于充裕。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury growing as the unification process succeeded.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 投资军事统一和灌溉基础设施建设。
fiscalPolicy.en: Investing in military unification and irrigation infrastructure.

description.zh: 安德里亚纳姆博伊尼梅里纳建立的职业化军队。
description.en: Professional army established by Andrianampoinimerina.

description.zh: 通过法纳波阿纳劳役制征召的民兵。
description.en: Militia levied through the fanompoana labor obligation system.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王亲自统帅
commanderInChief.en: The king personally commanded

technology.zh: 以传统铁矛和部分进口火器为主。正在获取更多火器。
technology.en: Mainly traditional iron spears with some imported firearms. More firearms were being acquired.

threats.zh: 其他马达加斯加王国的抵抗、欧洲殖民势力的潜在干预。
threats.en: Resistance from other Malagasy kingdoms and potential European colonial intervention.

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在马达加斯加中部高原肥沃的稻作区。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated in the fertile rice-growing central highlands of Madagascar.

socialClasses.zh: 安德里亚纳贵族、霍瓦自由民、安代沃奴隶三大种姓。
socialClasses.en: Three main castes: Andriana nobles, Hova free commoners, Andevo slaves.

allies.zh: 正在统一的高原诸邦
allies.en: Highland states being unified

enemies.zh: 抵抗统一的其他马达加斯加王国
enemies.en: Other Malagasy kingdoms resisting unification

foreignPolicy.zh: 统一伊梅里纳并向外扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Unifying Imerina and expanding outward.

era.zh: 18世纪马达加斯加

keyInnovations.zh: 精密灌溉梯田系统、冶铁技术、军事组织改革。
keyInnovations.en: Sophisticated irrigation terrace systems, ironworking, and military organizational reform.

strengths.zh: 灌溉农业提供稳定食物供给、集权化改革增强国力、领导力强。
strengths.en: Irrigated agriculture providing stable food supply, centralizing reforms strengthening state power, and strong leadership.

weaknesses.zh: 火器不足、面临其他王国抵抗、欧洲干预风险。
weaknesses.en: Insufficient firearms, resistance from other kingdoms, and risk of European intervention.

outlook.zh: 梅里纳将在19世纪统一大部分马达加斯加。
outlook.en: Merina would unify most of Madagascar in the 19th century.

description.zh: 正在统一马达加斯加高原的梅里纳王国。
description.en: The Merina Kingdom, unifying the Madagascar highlands.

governmentForm.zh: 隆达帝国分出的独立王国，以穆瓦塔·卡曾贝为核心的世袭君主制
governmentForm.en: An independent kingdom spun off from the Lunda Empire, a hereditary monarchy centered on the Mwata Kazembe

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族、地方首领、商人、农民、渔民和奴隶构成。铜矿和象牙贸易商人地位上升。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of royalty, local chiefs, merchants, farmers, fishermen, and slaves. Copper and ivory trade merchants held rising status.

rulingClass.zh: 穆瓦塔·卡曾贝王族和高级首领
rulingClass.en: The Mwata Kazembe royal house and senior chiefs

succession.zh: 穆瓦塔·卡曾贝位在王族内继承。
succession.en: The Mwata Kazembe position was inherited within the royal house.

structure.zh: 以卡曾贝城为中心，通过分封首领和贡赋网络管理莫韦鲁湖周边和赞比西河上游地区。
structure.en: Centered on the Kazembe capital, governing the Lake Mweru area and upper Zambezi region through enfeoffed chiefs and tribute networks.

function.zh: 最高治理机构。
function.en: Supreme governance body.

function.zh: 管理铜和象牙的长途贸易。
function.en: Managed long-distance copper and ivory trade.

localAdmin.zh: 通过分封首领和贡赋体系管理地方。
localAdmin.en: Managed locally through enfeoffed chiefs and the tribute system.

legalSystem.zh: 隆达系习惯法为主。
legalSystem.en: Lunda-derived customary law predominated.

taxationSystem.zh: 以贡赋、贸易税和劳役为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on tribute, trade taxes, and labor obligations.

religion.zh: 班图传统宗教
religion.en: Bantu traditional religion

culturalAchievements.zh: 铜十字形货币（汉达铜锭）铸造、口述历史传统、精美金属工艺。
culturalAchievements.en: Copper cross-currency (handa ingots) casting, oral historical traditions, and fine metalwork.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（本巴语/隆达语）
languageFamily.en: Bantu branch of Niger-Congo (Bemba/Lunda)

philosophy.zh: 祖灵崇拜与王权神圣性观念。
philosophy.en: Ancestral veneration and concepts of sacred kingship.

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统
writingSystem.en: Oral tradition

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济依赖铜矿开采、象牙贸易和渔业。卡曾贝控制了连接东非与西非的关键贸易通道。
gdpDescription.en: The economy relied on copper mining, ivory trade, and fishing. Kazembe controlled key trade corridors linking East and West Africa.

mainIndustries.zh: 铜矿开采、象牙贸易、渔业、农业、盐业
mainIndustries.en: Copper mining, ivory trade, fishing, agriculture, salt production

tradeGoods.zh: 铜、象牙、盐、奴隶、干鱼
tradeGoods.en: Copper, ivory, salt, slaves, dried fish

householdWealth.zh: 首领和商人以铜锭、象牙和奴隶为财富；普通家庭以渔具、农田和牲畜为资产。
householdWealth.en: Chiefs and merchants held wealth in copper ingots, ivory, and slaves; ordinary families held fishing equipment, farmland, and livestock.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋经济与长途贸易结合。铜十字形货币在区域贸易中广泛使用。
economicSystem.en: A tribute economy combined with long-distance trade. Copper cross-currency was widely used in regional trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室以铜锭和象牙为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Royal reserves held mainly in copper ingots and ivory.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持铜矿和贸易路线控制。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintaining control of copper mines and trade routes.

description.zh: 穆瓦塔·卡曾贝的直属军事力量。
description.en: The Mwata Kazembe's direct military force.

description.zh: 各首领征召的武装。
description.en: Armed forces levied by various chiefs.

commanderInChief.zh: 穆瓦塔·卡曾贝
commanderInChief.en: Mwata Kazembe

technology.zh: 传统铁兵器为主，部分火器通过东海岸贸易获得。
technology.en: Mainly traditional iron weapons, with some firearms obtained through East Coast trade.

threats.zh: 周边部族和隆达帝国的领土压力。
threats.en: Territorial pressure from surrounding tribes and the Lunda Empire.

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在莫韦鲁湖畔和赞比西河上游的农渔区域。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated in agricultural and fishing areas around Lake Mweru and the upper Zambezi.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与首领居上；商人和自由民居中；奴隶居下。
socialClasses.en: Royalty and chiefs at top; merchants and free commoners in middle; slaves at bottom.

allies.zh: 与隆达帝国保持松散联系；与东海岸商人有贸易关系
allies.en: Loose ties with the Lunda Empire; trade relations with East Coast merchants

enemies.zh: 周边竞争部族
enemies.en: Competing neighboring tribes

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持贸易自主权和对铜矿区的控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintaining trade autonomy and control over copper mining areas.

era.zh: 18世纪中非

keyInnovations.zh: 铜冶炼技术、跨大陆贸易网络组织、渔业技术。
keyInnovations.en: Copper smelting, transcontinental trade network organization, and fishing techniques.

strengths.zh: 铜矿资源、东西非贸易通道控制、隆达系政治组织遗产。
strengths.en: Copper resources, East-West African trade corridor control, and Lunda-derived political organizational heritage.

weaknesses.zh: 人口有限、火器不足、距海岸遥远。
weaknesses.en: Limited population, insufficient firearms, and distance from the coast.

outlook.zh: 卡曾贝将在19世纪面临葡萄牙和斯瓦希里商人的日益渗透。
outlook.en: Kazembe would face growing Portuguese and Swahili merchant penetration in the 19th century.

description.zh: 赞比亚地区的卡曾贝王国，中非铜贸易的重要节点。
description.en: The Kazembe Kingdom of the Zambia region, an important node in Central African copper trade.

governmentForm.zh: 葡萄牙殖民地，以奴隶贸易为核心经济活动
governmentForm.en: A Portuguese colony with the slave trade as its core economic activity

socialStructure.zh: 社会由葡萄牙殖民官员和商人、混血精英（安巴奎斯塔）、非洲首领、自由黑人、农民和大量被贩卖的奴隶构成。奴隶贸易主导一切社会关系。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Portuguese colonial officials and merchants, mixed-race elites (ambaquistas), African chiefs, free Blacks, farmers, and large numbers of enslaved people being trafficked. The slave trade dominated all social relations.

rulingClass.zh: 葡萄牙总督与殖民官僚、大奴隶贸易商
rulingClass.en: The Portuguese governor and colonial bureaucracy, and major slave traders

succession.zh: 总督由葡萄牙国王任命。
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the Portuguese king.

structure.zh: 罗安达设总督府，管理沿海殖民据点和内陆贸易站（普雷西迪奥）网络。实际控制范围有限，内陆通过非洲代理人和贸易关系施加间接影响。
structure.en: The governor's office in Luanda managed coastal colonial settlements and a network of inland trade posts (presídios). Actual control was limited, with influence in the interior exercised indirectly through African agents and trade relations.

function.zh: 殖民地最高行政机构。
function.en: Supreme colonial administrative body.

function.zh: 管理奴隶出口、关税和贸易登记。
function.en: Managed slave exports, customs, and trade registration.

function.zh: 管理驻军和内陆贸易站防御。
function.en: Managed garrisons and inland trade post defense.

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城镇由葡萄牙官员管理；内陆通过普雷西迪奥贸易站和非洲盟友间接控制。
localAdmin.en: Coastal towns managed by Portuguese officials; the interior indirectly controlled through presídio trade posts and African allies.

legalSystem.zh: 葡萄牙殖民法为主，对非洲人群体几乎不适用正式法律保护。
legalSystem.en: Portuguese colonial law predominated, with little formal legal protection applying to African populations.

taxationSystem.zh: 以奴隶出口税、关税和贸易许可费为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on slave export duties, customs, and trade license fees.

religion.zh: 天主教（殖民者）与非洲传统信仰并存
religion.en: Roman Catholicism (colonists) alongside African traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 罗安达发展出独特的克里奥尔殖民文化，混合了葡萄牙和非洲元素。
culturalAchievements.en: Luanda developed a distinctive Creole colonial culture, blending Portuguese and African elements.

languageFamily.zh: 葡萄牙语（官方）与金本杜语等班图语言
languageFamily.en: Portuguese (official) alongside Kimbundu and other Bantu languages

philosophy.zh: 殖民思想与非洲传统世界观在紧张中并存。
philosophy.en: Colonial ideology and African traditional worldviews coexisted in tension.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（葡萄牙语）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Portuguese)

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济几乎完全围绕大西洋奴隶贸易运转。罗安达和本格拉是主要奴隶出口港。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was almost entirely oriented around the Atlantic slave trade. Luanda and Benguela were the main slave-export ports.

mainIndustries.zh: 奴隶贸易、少量农业、渔业、沿海商贸
mainIndustries.en: Slave trade, minor agriculture, fishing, coastal commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶（主要出口）、象牙、蜂蜡；进口纺织品、武器、烈酒
tradeGoods.en: Slaves (main export), ivory, beeswax; imports of textiles, weapons, spirits

householdWealth.zh: 殖民商人积累大量奴隶贸易利润；非洲人口大多处于赤贫或被奴役状态。
householdWealth.en: Colonial merchants accumulated substantial slave trade profits; most African populations lived in destitution or enslavement.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民掠夺经济，以奴隶贸易为支柱。
economicSystem.en: A colonial extraction economy, with the slave trade as its pillar.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民财政依赖奴隶贸易，利润大部分回流葡萄牙。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances depended on the slave trade, with most profits flowing back to Portugal.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 最大化奴隶贸易收入并向葡萄牙汇缴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maximizing slave trade revenue and remitting to Portugal.

description.zh: 驻罗安达和本格拉的正规军。
description.en: Regular troops stationed in Luanda and Benguela.

description.zh: 从盟友部族征召的非洲武装。
description.en: African armed forces recruited from allied tribes.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督兼军事最高指挥
commanderInChief.en: The governor as supreme military commander

technology.zh: 欧洲火器和火炮，军事技术优于周边非洲势力。
technology.en: European firearms and artillery, militarily superior to surrounding African powers.

threats.zh: 非洲王国的抵抗、奴隶起义风险、其他欧洲列强的竞争。
threats.en: Resistance from African kingdoms, risk of slave revolts, and competition from other European powers.

populationDescription.zh: 人口以非洲原住民为绝大多数，葡萄牙殖民者和混血群体仅占极少数。每年有数万人被掳为奴隶出口。
populationDescription.en: The vast majority were indigenous Africans, with Portuguese colonists and mixed-race communities a tiny minority. Tens of thousands were captured as slaves for export annually.

socialClasses.zh: 葡萄牙殖民精英居顶；混血安巴奎斯塔阶层居中；非洲自由民和被奴役人口居底。
socialClasses.en: Portuguese colonial elite at top; mixed-race ambaquista class in middle; African free people and enslaved populations at bottom.

allies.zh: 葡萄牙王国（宗主国）、部分非洲盟友首领
allies.en: The Kingdom of Portugal (metropolitan power) and some allied African chiefs

enemies.zh: 抵抗殖民扩张的非洲王国和部族
enemies.en: African kingdoms and tribes resisting colonial expansion

foreignPolicy.zh: 扩大奴隶贸易腹地、与内陆非洲势力结盟或对抗。
foreignPolicy.en: Expanding the slave trade hinterland and allying with or confronting interior African powers.

era.zh: 18世纪殖民时代

keyInnovations.zh: 欧洲火器和航海技术、殖民行政体系、奴隶贸易组织。
keyInnovations.en: European firearms and navigation, colonial administrative systems, and slave trade organization.

strengths.zh: 军事技术优势、大西洋贸易网络、葡萄牙帝国支持。
strengths.en: Military-technological advantage, Atlantic trade networks, and Portuguese imperial support.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民者人数极少、内陆控制薄弱、经济完全依赖奴隶贸易。
weaknesses.en: Extremely few colonists, weak inland control, and complete economic dependence on the slave trade.

outlook.zh: 葡属安哥拉将在19世纪经历奴隶贸易衰落后艰难转型。
outlook.en: Portuguese Angola would face a difficult transition after the slave trade's decline in the 19th century.

description.zh: 以奴隶贸易为核心的葡属安哥拉殖民地。
description.en: Portuguese Angola, a colony centered on the slave trade.

title.zh: 卢梭发表《论科学与艺术》
title.en: Rousseau Publishes 'Discourse on the Sciences and Arts'

description.zh: 让-雅克·卢梭的论文获得第戎学院征文奖，他在文中主张科学和艺术的进步腐蚀了人类的道德。这篇反潮流的作品使卢梭一举成名，开启了他对启蒙理性的深刻批判。
description.en: Jean-Jacques Rousseau's essay won the Dijon Academy's prize, arguing that the progress of science and arts had corrupted human morality. This contrarian work catapulted Rousseau to fame and launched his profound critique of Enlightenment rationalism.

title.en: First Volume of the Encyclopédie Published

description.zh: 狄德罗和达朗贝尔主编的《百科全书》第一卷在巴黎出版。这部雄心勃勃的巨著旨在汇集所有人类知识，成为启蒙运动最具影响力的出版物之一。
description.en: The first volume of the Encyclopédie, edited by Diderot and d'Alembert, was published in Paris. This ambitious work aimed to compile all human knowledge and became one of the most influential publications of the Enlightenment.

title.zh: 本杰明·富兰克林的风筝实验

description.zh: 本杰明·富兰克林在雷雨天放风筝，证明了闪电是一种电现象。这一实验不仅推动了电学研究，也使富兰克林发明了避雷针，拯救了无数建筑和生命。
description.en: Benjamin Franklin flew a kite during a thunderstorm, proving that lightning was an electrical phenomenon. This experiment advanced the study of electricity and led to his invention of the lightning rod, saving countless buildings and lives.

description.zh: 里斯本遭受毁灭性大地震，随后的海啸和大火几乎摧毁了整座城市，约六万人遇难。这场灾难深刻影响了欧洲启蒙思想，引发了关于神义论和自然灾害的广泛哲学讨论。
description.en: Lisbon was struck by a devastating earthquake, followed by a tsunami and fires that nearly destroyed the entire city, killing approximately 60,000 people. The disaster profoundly influenced Enlightenment thought, sparking philosophical debates about theodicy and natural catastrophe.

description.zh: 英国与法国在北美和全球各地爆发大规模冲突，普鲁士与奥地利在欧洲对抗。这场战争被称为「真正的第一次世界大战」，涉及五大洲和所有主要欧洲强国。
description.en: Britain and France clashed on a massive scale in North America and globally, while Prussia fought Austria in Europe. Called the 'true First World War,' this conflict involved all five continents and every major European power.

title.zh: 普拉西战役：英国确立印度霸权
title.en: Battle of Plassey: British Establish Dominance in India

description.zh: 英国东印度公司的罗伯特·克莱武在普拉西战役中击败孟加拉纳瓦布。这场决定性的胜利使英国获得了孟加拉的实际控制权，开启了英国在印度的殖民统治。
description.en: Robert Clive of the British East India Company defeated the Nawab of Bengal at the Battle of Plassey. This decisive victory gave Britain effective control of Bengal, inaugurating British colonial rule in India.

title.zh: 罗斯巴赫战役：腓特烈大帝的辉煌胜利
title.en: Battle of Rossbach: Frederick the Great's Brilliant Victory

description.zh: 普鲁士国王腓特烈大帝在罗斯巴赫战役中以少胜多，大败法奥联军。这场战役展示了腓特烈卓越的军事才能，确立了普鲁士在欧洲军事强国中的地位。
description.en: Prussian King Frederick the Great defeated a combined Franco-Austrian army at the Battle of Rossbach with a much smaller force. This battle demonstrated Frederick's brilliant military genius and established Prussia's status among Europe's great military powers.

description.zh: 英国将领詹姆斯·沃尔夫率军攻占法属加拿大的重要据点魁北克城。亚伯拉罕平原战役的胜利决定了北美大陆的归属，法国殖民帝国从此走向衰落。
description.en: British General James Wolfe captured the key French Canadian stronghold of Quebec City. The victory at the Plains of Abraham determined the fate of North America, as the French colonial empire entered its decline.

title.en: George III Becomes King of Great Britain

description.zh: 乔治三世即位为大不列颠国王。他的统治将见证美洲殖民地的独立、拿破仑战争以及工业革命的兴起，是英国历史上最动荡也最辉煌的时期之一。
description.en: George III ascended the British throne. His reign would witness American independence, the Napoleonic Wars, and the rise of the Industrial Revolution — one of the most turbulent yet glorious periods in British history.

title.zh: 叶卡捷琳娜大帝发动政变登基
title.en: Catherine the Great Seizes Power in Coup

description.zh: 叶卡捷琳娜二世发动宫廷政变推翻丈夫彼得三世，登上俄罗斯帝位。她将推行启蒙改革、扩张领土、推动文化发展，使俄罗斯成为欧洲大国。
description.en: Catherine II staged a palace coup against her husband Peter III, ascending the Russian throne. She would implement Enlightenment reforms, expand territory, and promote culture, transforming Russia into a European great power.

title.en: Treaty of Paris Ends the Seven Years' War

description.zh: 英法签订《巴黎和约》，法国将加拿大和密西西比河以东的领土割让给英国。英国成为全球最大的殖民帝国，但战争的巨额债务为美国革命埋下了伏笔。
description.en: Britain and France signed the Treaty of Paris, with France ceding Canada and territory east of the Mississippi to Britain. Britain became the world's largest colonial empire, but the war's massive debts set the stage for the American Revolution.

title.zh: 英国对殖民地征收印花税
title.en: Britain Imposes Stamp Act on Colonies

description.zh: 英国议会通过《印花税法》，对北美殖民地的各种印刷品征税。殖民地居民以「无代表不纳税」为口号强烈反对，这成为美国独立运动的导火索之一。
description.en: The British Parliament passed the Stamp Act, taxing various printed materials in the American colonies. Colonists fiercely protested with the rallying cry 'No taxation without representation,' igniting one of the sparks of the American independence movement.

description.zh: 詹姆斯·瓦特获得改良蒸汽机的专利，引入分离冷凝器大幅提高了蒸汽机效率。瓦特蒸汽机成为工业革命的核心动力，彻底改变了生产方式和社会面貌。
description.en: James Watt patented his improved steam engine, introducing a separate condenser that dramatically increased efficiency. The Watt steam engine became the driving force of the Industrial Revolution, fundamentally transforming production methods and society.

title.zh: 库克船长到达澳大利亚

description.zh: 英国航海家詹姆斯·库克率奋进号到达澳大利亚东海岸，在植物学湾登陆。库克宣称此地为英国领土，为日后英国在澳大利亚的殖民开辟了道路。
description.en: British navigator James Cook reached the east coast of Australia aboard the Endeavour, landing at Botany Bay. Cook claimed the territory for Britain, paving the way for future British colonization of Australia.

description.zh: 俄罗斯、普鲁士和奥地利三国联合瓜分波兰-立陶宛联邦约三分之一的领土。这是现代欧洲历史上主权国家首次被邻国联合肢解，标志着波兰悲剧的开始。
description.en: Russia, Prussia, and Austria jointly partitioned approximately one-third of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth's territory. This was the first time in modern European history that a sovereign state was dismembered by its neighbors, marking the beginning of Poland's tragedy.

description.zh: 波士顿殖民地居民为抗议英国《茶税法》，扮装成印第安人将东印度公司的三船茶叶倾入港口。这一激进行动标志着美国独立运动从抗议走向了直接对抗。
description.en: Boston colonists, protesting the British Tea Act, disguised themselves as Native Americans and dumped three shiploads of East India Company tea into the harbor. This radical action marked the American independence movement's shift from protest to direct confrontation.

title.zh: 列克星敦和康科德战役：美国独立战争爆发
title.en: Battles of Lexington and Concord: American Revolution Begins

description.zh: 英军与马萨诸塞民兵在列克星敦和康科德发生武装冲突，打响了美国独立战争的第一枪。「列克星敦的枪声」震惊了整个大西洋世界，十三个殖民地走上了独立之路。
description.en: British troops and Massachusetts militia clashed at Lexington and Concord, firing the first shots of the American Revolution. 'The shot heard round the world' reverberated across the Atlantic, as thirteen colonies embarked on the path to independence.

description.zh: 北美十三个殖民地的代表在费城签署《独立宣言》，宣布脱离英国独立。杰弗逊起草的宣言提出「人人生而平等」的理念，成为人类历史上最重要的政治文献之一。
description.en: Representatives of thirteen American colonies signed the Declaration of Independence in Philadelphia, declaring independence from Britain. Drafted by Jefferson, its proclamation that 'all men are created equal' became one of the most important political documents in human history.

title.en: Adam Smith Publishes 'The Wealth of Nations'

description.zh: 苏格兰经济学家亚当·斯密出版《国民财富的性质和原因的研究》，系统阐述了自由市场经济理论。「看不见的手」理论奠定了古典经济学的基础，深刻影响了现代经济政策。
description.en: Scottish economist Adam Smith published 'An Inquiry into the Nature and Causes of the Wealth of Nations,' systematically articulating free-market economic theory. His 'invisible hand' concept laid the foundation for classical economics and profoundly influenced modern economic policy.

title.zh: 缅甸暹罗战争与贡榜王朝扩张

description.zh: 贡榜王朝继续对暹罗发动进攻，争夺对东南亚大陆的霸权。暹罗在达信大帝和后来的拉玛一世领导下顽强抵抗，最终保住了国家独立。
description.en: The Konbaung dynasty continued campaigns against Siam, competing for dominance over mainland Southeast Asia. Siam resisted tenaciously under Taksin the Great and later Rama I, ultimately preserving its independence.

title.en: Treaty of Paris Recognizes American Independence

description.zh: 英国签署《巴黎和约》，正式承认美利坚合众国的独立。这是近代史上殖民地首次成功脱离宗主国独立，极大地鼓舞了全球的革命和独立运动。
description.en: Britain signed the Treaty of Paris, formally recognizing the independence of the United States. This was the first successful colonial independence in modern history, greatly inspiring revolutionary and independence movements worldwide.

description.zh: 来自十二个州的代表在费城召开制宪会议，经过激烈辩论制定了《美国宪法》。这部宪法确立了三权分立和联邦制原则，成为世界上第一部成文宪法。
description.en: Delegates from twelve states convened a Constitutional Convention in Philadelphia, drafting the U.S. Constitution after intense debate. This constitution established the principles of separation of powers and federalism, becoming the world's first written national constitution.

title.zh: 法国大革命：攻占巴士底狱
title.en: French Revolution: Storming of the Bastille

description.zh: 巴黎市民攻占象征王权专制的巴士底监狱，标志着法国大革命的爆发。这场革命将推翻波旁王朝、废除封建制度，深刻改变法国乃至整个世界的政治格局。
description.en: Parisian citizens stormed the Bastille prison, a symbol of royal tyranny, marking the outbreak of the French Revolution. The revolution would overthrow the Bourbon dynasty, abolish feudalism, and profoundly reshape the political landscape of France and the entire world.

description.zh: 缅甸贡榜王朝军队攻陷暹罗首都大城，四百年历史的大城王朝灭亡。达信大帝随后驱逐缅军，统一暹罗并建立吞武里王朝，开启暹罗复兴之路。
description.en: Burmese Konbaung forces captured the Siamese capital Ayutthaya, destroying the four-century-old Ayutthaya Kingdom. Taksin the Great subsequently expelled the Burmese, reunified Siam, and founded the Thonburi dynasty, beginning Siam's revival.

title.zh: 英国在澳大利亚建立殖民地

description.zh: 英国第一批流放犯船队抵达悉尼湾，建立了新南威尔士殖民地。这标志着欧洲人对澳大利亚殖民的开始，对原住民社会造成了毁灭性的影响。
description.en: The British First Fleet arrived at Sydney Cove, establishing the colony of New South Wales. This marked the beginning of European colonization of Australia, with devastating consequences for Aboriginal societies.
